posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: R to @TheHackersNews: The affected ranges now split: • 6.8.0–6.8.5: SQL injection only • 6.9.0–6.9.4: full RCE chain • 7.0.0–7.0.1: full RCE chain No exploitation was reported as of July 18, but the exploit is now public. How the exploit path works: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/new-wp2shell-wordpress-core-flaw-lets.html
posts.text_zh: R 致@TheHackersNews：受影響的範圍現在分為： • 6.8.0–6.8.5：僅限 SQL 注入 • 6.9.0–6.9.4：完整的 RCE 鏈 • 7.0.0–7.0.1：完整的 RCE 鏈 截至 7 月 18 日，尚未公開利用情況，但該報告現已公開利用。漏洞利用路徑如何運作：https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/new-wp2shell-wordpress-core-flaw-lets.html

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: R to @TheHackersNews: One condition narrows the RCE path: it works only when #WordPress is not using a persistent object cache. Default installs have no such cache. Redis or Memcached may interrupt this chain, but they do not fix the SQL injection.
posts.text_zh: R 致 @TheHackersNews：有一個條件縮小了 RCE 路徑：它僅在 #WordPress 不使用持久物件快取時才有效。預設安裝沒有這樣的快取。 Redis 或 Memcached 可能會中斷此鏈，但它們無法修復 SQL 注入。

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: ⚡ UPDATE: #wp2shell now has two CVEs, and a working proof-of-concept is public. > CVE-2026-63030 breaks REST batch routing > CVE-2026-60137 injects SQL Chained, they give an anonymous attacker code execution on affected WordPress sites.
posts.text_zh: ⚡ 更新：#wp2shell 現在有兩個 CVE，並且公開了有效的概念驗證。 > CVE-2026-63030 破壞 REST 批次路由 > CVE-2026-60137 注入 SQL Chained，它們讓匿名攻擊者在受影響的 WordPress 網站上執行程式碼。

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: R to @vxunderground: tldr you sending me malware is good, sometimes really interesting things happen. Thank you for sending me malware. Also, I really want to note I didn't do any investigative work or whatever, I just reverse engineered it, explained how it works, noted some IPs or crypto wallets, nothing else. I'm just the malware guy. I'm nothing else. There were a lot of people who came together after BlockBlasters appeared that did really cool stuff and helped a lot of people. Lots of people shared information publicly which identified people. I'm just bonking stuff with sticks and looking at cats
posts.text_zh: R 致@vxunderground：tldr，你向我發送惡意軟體很好，有時會發生非常有趣的事情。感謝您向我發送惡意軟體。另外，我真的想指出，我沒有做任何調查工作或其他什麼，我只是對其進行逆向工程，解釋它是如何工作的，記錄了一些 IP 或加密錢包，僅此而已。我只是惡意軟體的人。我什麼都不是。 BlockBlasters 出現後，有很多人聚集在一起，做了非常酷的事情並幫助了很多人。許多人公開分享識別人員身分的資訊。我只是用棍子敲打東西並看著貓

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Maybe a year ago, I don't remember, a game appeared on Steam called BlockBlasters. BlockBlasters was actually malware, and it gained recognition primarily because it was used to crypto drain a terminally ill cancer patient. I was the first person (to the best of my knowledge) to reverse engineer BlockBlasters after people began notifying me about the game on Steam potentially being malware. It ended up being a huge deal, primarily because BlockBlasters was used for targeted crypto draining campaigns. Anyway, the FBI has begun arresting the people. The first person arrested was 21 year old Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins, based out of Florida. I assume more arrests are coming. This person specifically made $220,000 from the malware campaign, with $32,000 coming from a terminally ill (now deceased) cancer patient.
posts.text_zh: 也許一年前，我不記得了，Steam 上出現了一款名為 BlockBlasters 的遊戲。 BlockBlasters 實際上是惡意軟體，它獲得認可主要是因為它被用來加密末期癌症患者。在人們開始通知我 Steam 上的遊戲可能是惡意軟體後，我是第一個（據我所知）對 BlockBlasters 進行逆向工程的人。這最終成為了一件大事，主要是因為 BlockBlasters 被用於有針對性的加密貨幣耗盡活動。不管怎樣，聯邦調查局已經開始逮捕這些人了。第一名被捕者是佛羅裡達州 21 歲的 Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins。我猜還會有更多人被逮捕。此人從惡意軟體活動中具體賺取了 22 萬美元，其中 32,000 美元來自一位身患絕症（現已死亡）的癌症患者。

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: R to @The_Cyber_News: WordPress has shipped version 7.0.2, along with backported fixes in 6.9.5 and 6.8.6, addressing both the critical RCE issue and a high-severity SQL injection flaw.
posts.text_zh: R 致 @The_Cyber​​_News：WordPress 已發布 7.0.2 版本，以及 6.9.5 和 6.8.6 中的反向移植修復程序，解決了關鍵的 RCE 問題和高嚴重性的 SQL 注入缺陷。

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: 🚨 New wp2shell RCE Vulnerability Hits Millions of WordPress Sites, Emergency Patch Released Source: https://cybersecuritynews.com/wp2shell-rce-vulnerability/ A critical pre-authentication remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability dubbed "wp2shell" has been discovered in WordPress Core, putting an estimated 500 million+ websites at risk of full takeover by unauthenticated attackers. The flaw, which stems from a REST API batch-route confusion issue that leads to SQL injection and, ultimately, remote code execution. What makes this bug especially dangerous is that it requires no preconditions and can be exploited by a completely anonymous, unauthenticated user against a stock WordPress installation with zero plugins installed. #cybersecuritynews
posts.text_zh: 🚨 新的 wp2shell RCE 漏洞影響數百萬 WordPress 網站，已發布緊急修補程式 來源：https://cybersecuritynews.com/wp2shell-rce-vulnerability/ 在 WordPress Core 中發現了一個名為「wp2shell」的關鍵預驗證遠端程式碼執行 (RCE) 漏洞，估計使未經身份驗證的網站面臨超過 5 億個身份驗證的網站面臨風險此缺陷源自 REST API 批次路由混淆問題，該問題會導致 SQL 注入並最終導致遠端程式碼執行。這個漏洞之所以特別危險，是因為它不需要先決條件，並且可以被完全匿名、未經身份驗證的用戶針對安裝了零個外掛程式的 WordPress 安裝進行利用。 #網路安全新聞

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨🇦🇷 Instituto Ferrero de Neurología y Sueño data allegedly being ransomed for $150,000 A forum actor claims to have breached Instituto Ferrero de Neurología y Sueño, an Argentine medical center specializing in neurological and sleep disorders. The listing advertises 636GB of data containing approximately 474,826 files tied to 103,315 users. The actor is demanding $150,000 and threatens to sell the material if payment is not made by August 5, 2026. The allegedly compromised material may include patient, clinical, administrative, and other internal records, although the post does not provide a detailed breakdown of the exposed fields. Samples were shared through the actor’s Telegram channel. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇦🇷 Instituto Ferrero de Neurología y Sueño 數據據稱被勒索 15 萬美元 一名論壇演員聲稱入侵了 Instituto Ferrero de Neurología y Sueño，一家專門研究神經系統和睡眠障礙的阿根廷醫療中心。該清單公佈了 636GB 的數據，其中包含與 103,315 個用戶相關的約 474,826 個檔案。該演員索要 15 萬美元，並威脅稱，如果在 2026 年 8 月 5 日之前不付款，將出售這些材料。據稱，洩露的資料可能包括患者、臨床、管理和其他內部記錄，但該貼文沒有提供暴露欄位的詳細分類。樣品是透過演員的 Telegram 頻道分享的。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。 💥 在地下索賠成為頭條新聞之前儘早了解它們，包括清晰的螢幕截圖：http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨🇷🇴 Romanian government and commercial datasets allegedly bundled for sale A forum actor claims to be selling a bundle described as six Romanian datasets containing property, aviation, education, court, and courier records. The listing advertises 27,796,642 national property registration records, 437,809 court cases, more than 1.55 million courier delivery records, teacher salary data covering all 42 counties, and 94 files allegedly taken from the Bucharest Airports backend. The complete bundle is priced at $5,000. The allegedly exposed information includes names, CNP identifiers, home and delivery addresses, property details, teacher positions and salaries, court parties, IBANs, phone numbers, email addresses, hearing dates, flight information, administrator accounts, password hashes, contact submissions, subscriber details, and login logs. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇷🇴 據稱捆綁出售羅馬尼亞政府和商業資料集 一名論壇參與者聲稱正在出售一個捆綁包，該資料集被描述為六個羅馬尼亞資料集，其中包含財產、航空、教育、法院和快遞記錄。該清單公佈了 27,796,642 項國家財產登記記錄、437,809 起法院案件、超過 155 萬筆快遞遞送記錄、涵蓋所有 42 個縣的教師工資數據，以及據稱從布加勒斯特機場後端獲取的 94 個文件。完整套裝售價為 5,000 美元。據稱暴露的資訊包括姓名、CNP 識別碼、家庭和送貨地址、財產詳細資料、教師職位和工資、法庭當事人、IBAN、電話號碼、電子郵件地址、聽證會日期、航班資訊、管理員帳戶、密碼哈希、聯絡人提交資訊、訂閱者詳細資料和登入日誌。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。 💥 在地下索賠成為頭條新聞之前儘早了解它們，包括清晰的螢幕截圖：http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨🇧🇷 Receita Federal dataset containing 279 million CPF records allegedly listed for sale A forum actor claims to have extracted a current dataset from systems tied to Brazil’s Receita Federal containing 279,008,638 records. The actor also claims to possess an older backup created in 2019 containing approximately 248 million CPF entries. The newly advertised dataset is described as a 69.6GB file, with two samples containing 10,000 records each published as proof. The actor is asking $10,000 for the alleged 2026 dataset and $1,300 for the 2019 backup, payable in Bitcoin or Monero. The allegedly exposed information includes CPF numbers, full names, dates of birth, email addresses, phone numbers, residential addresses, postal codes, municipalities, occupations, nationalities, parents’ names, sex, tax-registration dates, cadastral status, foreign residency indicators, and death-related records. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇧🇷 Receita Federal 資料集，據稱包含 2.79 億筆 CPF 記錄，據稱已掛牌出售 一名論壇參與者聲稱已從與巴西 Receita Federal 相關的系統中提取了當前資料集，其中包含 279,008,638 條記錄。該演員還聲稱擁有 2019 年創建的舊備份，其中包含約 2.48 億條 CPF 條目。新公佈的資料集被描述為一個 69.6GB 的文件，其中兩個樣本包含 10,000 條記錄，每個樣本作為證據發布。該演員要求為所謂的 2026 年數據集索要 10,000 美元，為 2019 年備份索要 1,300 美元，可以用比特幣或門羅幣支付。據稱暴露的資訊包括公積金號碼、全名、出生日期、電子郵件地址、電話號碼、居住地址、郵遞區號、城市、職業、國籍、父母姓名、性別、稅務登記日期、地籍狀況、外國居住指標和死亡相關記錄。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。 💥 在地下索賠成為頭條新聞之前儘早了解它們，包括清晰的螢幕截圖：http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: R to @TheHackersNews: No exploitation had been reported as of July 18, and the flaw still had no CVE or CVSS score. Until patched, defenders can block anonymous access to both REST batch routes.
posts.text_zh: R 至 @TheHackersNews：截至 7 月 18 日，尚未報告任何利用該漏洞的情況，且該缺陷仍然沒有 CVE 或 CVSS 評分。在修補之前，防禦者可以阻止對兩個 REST 批次路由的匿名存取。

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: R to @TheHackersNews: Affected versions: • WordPress 6.9.0 through 6.9.4 • WordPress 7.0.0 through 7.0.1 WordPress 6.9.5, 7.0.2, and 7.1 beta2 carry the fix.
posts.text_zh: R 回覆 @TheHackersNews：受影響的版本： • WordPress 6.9.0 至 6.9.4 • WordPress 7.0.0 至 7.0.1 WordPress 6.9.5、7.0.2 和 7.1 beta2 包含此修復。

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: R to @TheHackersNews: WordPress says the flaw comes from REST API batch-route confusion and SQL injection that can lead to remote code execution. The affected code is in core, not a plugin.
posts.text_zh: R 致 @TheHackersNews：WordPress 表示，該缺陷來自 REST API 批量路由混淆和 SQL 注入，可能導致遠端程式碼執行。受影響的程式碼位於核心中，而不是插件中。

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: ‼️🇺🇸 Abbott has released a statement regarding ShinyHunters claim on Abbott owned Exact Sciences Corporation: "Abbott is investigating a cyber incident in which there was unauthorized access to a limited number of internal systems in our Cancer Diagnostics business only.  This does not impact any business operations, product or product availability, manufacturing or lab operations, or our ability to serve patients. There is no impact to any other Abbott businesses, sites or systems. The legacy Exact Sciences systems are separate from Abbott’s. Upon learning this, we took immediate steps to address the situation. We have engaged leading third-party cybersecurity experts and law enforcement and are working diligently to further investigate the information accessed and resolve this issue. Based on what we know at this time, we do not expect any material impact on the business or financial results. We take our responsibility to protect our systems and data very seriously and will continue to closely monitor our systems." Source: https://www.abbott.com/en-us/corpnewsroom/diagnostics-testing/abbott-statement-on-cyber-incident-in-cancer-diagnostics-business
posts.text_zh: ️🇺🇸 Abbott 就 ShinyHunters 對 Abbott 旗下 Exact Sciences Corporation 的索賠發表了一份聲明：「Abbott 正在調查一起網絡事件，該事件僅在我們的癌症診斷業務中未經授權訪問了有限數量的內部系統。這不會影響任何業務運營、產品或產品、產品或實驗室運營能力或我們為我們的業務服務系統與得知這一情況後，我們立即採取了措施來解決這一問題，並正在努力進一步調查所獲取的資訊並解決此問題，我們預計不會對業務或財務業績產生任何重大影響，並將繼續密切監控我們的系統。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 400,327 Government Supplier Records Allegedly Exposed in Mexico A threat actor claims that more than 400,000 supplier records belonging to DIF Tamaulipas (Sistema para el Desarrollo Integral de la Familia), a government family services agency in the Mexican state of Tamaulipas, were left publicly accessible without authentication. According to the post, the exposed database allegedly contains 400,327 supplier registrations, including: * Full names of individuals and companies * Mexican RFC (Tax ID) numbers * Physical addresses * Phone numbers * Email addresses * Legal representative names * Municipality and state information * Business categories and services provided The actor claims the data was openly accessible without authentication rather than obtained through a traditional network intrusion. At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified, and no official statement confirming the exposure has been identified. 💡 Analyst Note: Government supplier databases contain highly valuable information that can be weaponized for procurement fraud, business email compromise (BEC), spear phishing, and identity theft. Public-facing systems containing sensitive records should never rely on obscurity and must be routinely audited for authentication and access control weaknesses. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 墨西哥據稱有 400,327 條政府供應商記錄被洩露 一名威脅行為者聲稱，屬於墨西哥塔毛利帕斯州政府家庭服務機構 DIF Tamaulipas (Sistema para el Desarrollo Integral de la Familia) 的超過 400,000 條供應商記錄在未經身份驗證的情況下被公開身份驗證的情況。根據該帖子，暴露的數據庫據稱包含 400,327 個供應商註冊信息，包括： * 個人和公司的全名 * 墨西哥 RFC（稅號）號碼 * 實際地址 * 電話號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 法定代表人姓名 * 市和州信息 * 提供的業務類別和服務 該行為者聲稱這些數據是無需身份驗證的網絡訪問的，而不是通過傳統身份驗證的網絡。截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到獨立核實，也沒有確認該事件的官方聲明。 💡 分析師註釋：政府供應商資料庫包含非常有價值的信息，這些信息可用於採購欺詐、商業電子郵件洩露 (BEC)、魚叉式網絡釣魚和身份盜竊。包含敏感記錄的面向公眾的系統絕不應該依賴模糊性，並且必須定期審核身份驗證和存取控制弱點。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Mexico

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: 🛑 OpenSSL quietly fixed HollowByte, a flaw where an 11-byte TLS request can reserve up to 131 KB of server memory per connection. On the glibc systems researchers tested, that memory remained frozen until restart. Full details: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/openssl-hollowbyte-flaw-could-freeze.html
posts.text_zh: 🛑 OpenSSL 悄悄修復了 HollowByte，這是一個缺陷，其中 11 位元組 TLS 請求可以為每個連線保留最多 131 KB 的伺服器記憶體。在研究人員測試的 glibc 系統上，該內存在重新啟動之前一直保持凍結狀態。完整詳細資訊：https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/openssl-hollowbyte-flaw-could-freeze.html

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇨🇦 Alleged http://MieuxEnseigner.ca User Database Offered for Sale on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to http://MieuxEnseigner.ca, a Canadian educational resource platform. According to the listing, the alleged dataset contains approximately 305,000 user accounts and includes: * Email addresses * MD5 password hashes * Password salts The seller also shared sample records appearing to show email addresses alongside hashed passwords and salts. At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified, and http://MieuxEnseigner.ca has not publicly acknowledged a security incident. 💡 Analyst Note: Even when passwords are salted, MD5 is an outdated hashing algorithm that is no longer considered secure against modern password-cracking techniques. Users should change their passwords immediately if they reused them on other services, and organizations should migrate to modern password hashing algorithms such as Argon2id, bcrypt, or scrypt. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Canada
posts.text_zh: 🇨🇦 據稱在網路犯罪論壇上出售 http://MieuxEnseigner.ca 使用者資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於加拿大教育資源平台 http://MieuxEnseigner.ca 的資料庫。根據清單，涉嫌的資料集包含約 305,000 個使用者帳戶，包括： * 電子郵件地址 * MD5 密碼雜湊 * 密碼鹽 賣家也分享了樣本記錄，顯示電子郵件地址以及雜湊密碼和鹽。截至本文撰寫時，這些說法尚未得到獨立驗證，http://MieuxEnseigner.ca 尚未公開承認發生安全事件。 💡 分析師註釋：即使密碼經過加鹽處理，MD5 也是一種過時的雜湊演算法，不再被認為可以安全地抵禦現代密碼破解技術。如果使用者在其他服務上重複使用密碼，則應立即變更密碼，組織應遷移到現代密碼雜湊演算法，例如 Argon2id、bcrypt 或 scrypt。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Canada

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: ⚠️ Alleged Ramp4u[.]io Database Offered for Sale on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a full SQL database belonging to Ramp4u, a XenForo-powered online forum. According to the listing, the database allegedly contains: * 7,709 registered users * 7,784 forum posts * 1,732 discussion threads * 340,333 IP log entries * 3,875 private messages * Additional forum data dating back to 2024 The seller is asking $3,000 for the alleged database and claims it includes the complete XenForo SQL export. At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified, and Ramp4u has not publicly acknowledged a security incident. 💡 Analyst Note: Forum databases often contain significantly more than usernames and email addresses. Private messages, IP logs, and historical account activity can provide valuable intelligence for threat actors, enabling account takeover attempts, phishing campaigns, user deanonymization, and further attacks against community members. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #DataBreach
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 涉嫌在網路犯罪論壇上出售 Ramp4u[.]io 資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於 Ramp4u（一個 XenForo 支持的線上論壇）的完整 SQL 資料庫。根據清單，該資料庫據稱包含： * 7,709 個註冊用戶 * 7,784 個論壇帖子 * 1,732 個討論線程 * 340,333 個 IP 日誌條目 * 3,875 個私人訊息 * 可追溯到 2024 年的其他論壇資料 賣家為所謂的資料庫要價 3,000 美元，並聲稱它包含完整的 SQLen 資料。截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到獨立驗證，Ramp4u 尚未公開承認發生安全事件。 💡 分析師註釋：論壇資料庫通常包含的不僅僅是使用者名稱和電子郵件地址。私人訊息、IP 日誌和歷史帳戶活動可以為威脅行為者提供有價值的情報，從而實現帳戶接管嘗試、網路釣魚活動、用戶去匿名化以及針對社群成員的進一步攻擊。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #DataBreach

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇳🇱 Previously Disclosed BCD Travel Data Reappears on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising a dataset associated with BCD Travel, a global corporate travel management company. Unlike many new listings, this dataset appears to reference the previously disclosed May 2026 ShinyHunters extortion incident rather than a newly discovered breach. The listing also references the public Have I Been Pwned (HIBP) entry for the incident. According to the advertised dataset: * Approximately 396,000–687,000 records are referenced across different sources. * The exposed information reportedly includes: * Email addresses * Names * Phone numbers * Physical addresses * Employer names * Job titles * Support tickets * Sample data appears to include Salesforce-related fields and internal customer records. At this time, there is no evidence that this represents a new compromise. The listing appears to be a resale or redistribution of data from the previously reported BCD Travel incident. 💡 Analyst Note: Cybercriminals frequently repackage and resell older breach data months or even years after the original incident. Organizations should not assume that previously leaked data has disappeared from underground forums, as recycled datasets continue to fuel phishing, business email compromise (BEC), and identity theft campaigns. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Travel
posts.text_zh: 🇳🇱 先前揭露的 BCD Travel 資料再次出現在網路犯罪論壇上 威脅行為者正在宣傳與全球企業差旅管理公司 BCD Travel 相關的資料集。與許多新清單不同，該資料集似乎引用了先前披露的 2026 年 5 月 ShinyHunters 勒索事件，而不是新發現的違規事件。該清單還引用了該事件的公開 Have I Been Pwned (HIBP) 條目。根據公佈的資料集： * 不同來源引用了大約 396,000–687,000 筆記錄。 * 據報道，暴露的資訊包括： * 電子郵件地址 * 姓名 * 電話號碼 * 實際地址 * 雇主名稱 * 職位 * 支援票證 * 範例資料似乎包括 Salesforce 相關欄位和內部客戶記錄。目前，沒有證據表明這代表了新的妥協。該清單似乎是先前報告的 BCD Travel 事件資料的轉售或重新分發。 💡 分析師註釋：網路犯罪分子經常在原始事件發生數月甚至數年後重新打包並轉售舊的違規資料。組織不應假設先前洩漏的資料已從地下論壇中消失，因為回收的資料集繼續助長網路釣魚、商業電子郵件洩露 (BEC) 和身分盜竊活動。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Travel

posts.text: 🪙 Alleged Litecoinline Customer Database Offered for Sale on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a full database belonging to http://Litecoinline.com, a cryptocurrency-related platform. According to the listing, the leaked dataset allegedly includes approximately 60,000 user accounts and contains: * SQL database export * Email addresses * MD5 password hashes * Account balances * Additional user-related data The seller also shared screenshots appearing to show database tables and SQL export files as proof of possession. At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified, and Litecoinline has not publicly confirmed a security incident. 💡 Analyst Note: If authentic, the presence of MD5 password hashes is particularly concerning. MD5 is considered cryptographically broken and can often be cracked rapidly when weak or reused passwords are used. Users of the platform should immediately change their passwords, avoid password reuse across services, and enable multi-factor authentication wherever available. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Crypto
posts.text_zh: 🪙 據稱在網路犯罪論壇上出售 Litecoinline 客戶資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於加密貨幣相關平台 http://Litecoinline.com 的完整資料庫。根據清單，洩漏的資料集據稱包括約 60,000 個使用者帳戶，並包含： * SQL 資料庫匯出 * 電子郵件地址 * MD5 密碼雜湊 * 帳戶餘額 * 其他使用者相關資料 賣家還分享了顯示資料庫表格和 SQL 匯出檔案的螢幕截圖，作為所有權證明。截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到獨立驗證，Litecoinline 尚未公開確認安全事件。 💡 分析師註釋：如果是真實的，MD5 密碼雜湊值的存在尤其令人擔憂。 MD5 被認為是密碼學上被破壞的，當使用弱密碼或重複使用的密碼時，通常可以快速破解。平台使用者應立即變更密碼，避免跨服務重複使用密碼，並盡可能啟用多重驗證。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Crypto

posts.text: 🇫🇷 Alleged SFR Customer Database Offered for Sale on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor claims to have breached SFR (http://sfr.fr), one of France's largest telecommunications providers, and is offering what they describe as a partial customer database for sale. According to the post, the actor alleges: * Approximately 2.1 million customer records were obtained. * Access was gained through an internal tool referred to as "NOVA." * The dataset allegedly contains customers with home internet subscriptions and associated mobile account information. * The attackers claim their activity was detected before they could complete the exfiltration, resulting in only a partial dataset being stolen. At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified, and SFR has not publicly confirmed a security incident matching these allegations. 💡 Analyst Note: Telecommunications providers remain high-value targets due to the volume of customer identity, contact, and account data they manage. Even partial datasets can facilitate phishing, SIM-swapping, identity theft, and targeted social engineering campaigns. Organizations should treat these claims seriously while awaiting official confirmation. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 涉嫌在網路犯罪論壇上出售 SFR 客戶資料庫 一名威脅行為者聲稱已經入侵了法國最大的電信供應商之一 SFR (http://sfr.fr)，並正在出售他們所描述的部分客戶資料庫。根據該帖子，該演員聲稱： * 獲得了大約 210 萬筆客戶記錄。 * 存取權限是透過稱為「NOVA」的內部工具獲得的。 * 據稱，該資料集包含擁有家庭網路訂閱和相關行動帳戶資訊的客戶。 * 攻擊者聲稱他們的活動在完成滲透之前就被偵測到，導致僅部分資料集被盜。截至本文撰寫時，這些說法尚未得到獨立核實，SFR 尚未公開證實與這些指控相符的安全事件。 💡 分析師註釋：由於電信供應商管理大量客戶身分、聯絡人和帳戶數據，因此它們仍然是高價值目標。即使是部分資料集也可能促進網路釣魚、SIM 卡交換、身份盜竊和有針對性的社會工程活動。組織在等待官方確認的同時應認真對待這些說法。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #France

posts.text: 🇧🇩 Alleged Data for Bangladesh's eCourier Offered for Sale on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor has listed what they claim is a database belonging to eCourier, one of Bangladesh's largest last-mile logistics providers. According to the listing, the dataset allegedly contains: * Approximately 4.98 million records * Customer names * Phone numbers * Physical addresses The actor shared a small sample of the alleged data and is advertising the database for sale through Telegram. At the time of writing, the authenticity of the claims has not been independently verified, and there is no public indication that eCourier has confirmed a security incident. 💡 Analyst Note: Whether obtained through a direct compromise, a third-party supplier, or previously exposed data, logistics databases are highly valuable to cybercriminals. Such information can be leveraged for phishing, social engineering, SIM-swapping, delivery scams, identity theft, and targeted fraud. Organizations should investigate these claims promptly and notify affected users if a breach is confirmed. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Bangladesh
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇩 孟加拉 eCourier 的涉嫌數據在網路犯罪論壇上出售 威脅行為者列出了他們聲稱屬於孟加拉國最大的最後一英里物流提供者之一 eCourier 的資料庫。根據清單，該資料集據稱包含： * 大約 498 萬筆記錄 * 客戶姓名 * 電話號碼 * 實際地址 該行為者分享了所指控資料的一小部分樣本，並透過 Telegram 宣傳該資料庫進行銷售。截至撰寫本文時，這些說法的真實性尚未得到獨立驗證，也沒有公開跡象表明 eCourier 已確認發生安全事件。 💡 分析師註釋：無論是透過直接妥協、第三方供應商或先前暴露的資料獲得的，物流資料庫對於網路犯罪分子來說都非常有價值。此類資訊可用於網路釣魚、社會工程、SIM 卡交換、送貨詐騙、身分盜竊和有針對性的詐欺。組織應立即調查這些索賠，並在確認違規後通知受影響的使用者。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Bangladesh

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Pinned: 🔐 Credential stuffing remains one of the most effective account takeover techniques because attackers don't need to crack passwords, they simply reuse credentials stolen in previous data breaches. A typical credential stuffing attack looks like this: * Threat actors collect leaked usernames and passwords from data breaches, infostealer logs, and underground forums. * Automated bots test millions of credential pairs against popular websites. * Proxy networks rotate IP addresses to bypass rate limits and evade detection. * Valid credentials provide immediate access to victim accounts. * Compromised accounts are then used for fraud, data theft, or sold on cybercrime marketplaces. How to defend against credential stuffing: * Enable Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) wherever possible. * Deploy rate limiting and login throttling. * Detect bot activity using device fingerprinting and behavioral analytics. * Monitor for compromised credentials and force password resets when necessary. * Block known malicious IPs, VPNs, proxies, and bot infrastructure. * Encourage users to use unique passwords for every service and adopt password managers. 💡 Analyst Note: Credential stuffing succeeds because people reuse passwords, not because attackers are exceptionally sophisticated. Preventing password reuse and enforcing MFA can stop the vast majority of these attacks before they become account takeovers. #DDW #CyberSecurity #CredentialStuffing #AccountSecurity
posts.text_zh: 已固定：🔐 憑證填充仍然是最有效的帳戶接管技術之一，因為攻擊者不需要破解密碼，他們只需重複使用在先前的資料外洩中竊取的憑證。典型的撞庫攻擊如下所示： * 威脅參與者從資料外洩、資訊竊取者日誌和地下論壇中收集洩漏的使用者名稱和密碼。 * 自動機器人針對熱門網站測試數百萬個憑證對。 * 代理網路輪換 IP 位址以繞過速率限制並逃避偵測。 * 有效的憑證可以立即存取受害者帳戶。 * 受損的帳戶隨後被用於詐欺、資料竊取或在網路犯罪市場上出售。如何防禦撞庫： * 盡可能啟用多重驗證 (MFA)。 * 部署速率限制和登入限制。 * 使用設備指紋識別和行為分析檢測機器人活動。 * 監控憑證外洩並在必要時強制重設密碼。 * 封鎖已知的惡意 IP、VPN、代理程式和機器人基礎設施。 * 鼓勵使用者對每項服務使用唯一的密碼並採用密碼管理器。 💡 分析師註解：撞庫成功是因為人們重複使用密碼，而不是因為攻擊者異常老練。防止密碼重複使用並強制執行 MFA 可以在絕大多數此類攻擊變成帳戶接管之前阻止它們。 #DDW #Cyber​​Security #CredentialStuffing #AccountSecurity

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 French Insurance Group ARGOS Allegedly Targeted A threat actor is advertising the sale of alleged access to ARGOS, the French insurance anti-fraud organization (Groupement d'Assureurs Français). * The actor is offering alleged access for $120 * The listing claims the access enables vehicle registration number and VIN lookups * No evidence has been provided that would independently verify the authenticity or scope of the claimed access * At the time of writing, ARGOS has not publicly acknowledged any security incident related to these claims Analyst Note: Organizations providing vehicle identification and insurance-related services are attractive targets because unauthorized access could expose sensitive vehicle ownership and insurance information. Such access may facilitate vehicle theft, insurance fraud, identity theft, or social engineering targeting policyholders. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 據稱成為攻擊目標的法國保險集團 ARGOS 一名威脅行為者正在宣傳出售法國保險反欺詐組織 (Groupement d'Assureurs Français) 的 ARGOS 訪問權限。 * 該行為者以 120 美元的價格提供所謂的訪問權限 * 列表聲稱該訪問權限可以進行車輛登記號和 VIN 查找 * 沒有提供任何證據可以獨立驗證所聲稱的訪問權限的真實性或範圍 * 截至撰寫本文時，ARGOS 尚未公開承認與這些聲明相關的任何安全事件 分析師注：提供車輛識別和相關服務的組織是確定和保險的汽車此類訪問可能會促進車輛盜竊、保險詐欺、身份盜竊或針對投保人的社會工程。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: ⚠️ Seven malicious npm packages are targeting Vite developers. They stay quiet during installation. Import one, and it starts a RAT delivery chain that can steal credentials, exfiltrate files, and open a reverse shell. The attacker stores the delivery path in public blockchain transactions. See the affected packages and full attack chain: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/seven-malicious-vite-npm-packages-use.html
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 7 個惡意 npm 套件針對 Vite 開發者。它們在安裝過程中保持安靜。匯入一個，它就會啟動一個 RAT 傳遞鏈，可以竊取憑證、竊取檔案並開啟反向 shell。攻擊者將傳遞路徑儲存在公共區塊鏈交易中。查看受影響的軟體包和完整的攻擊鏈：https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/seven-malicious-vite-npm-packages-use.html

posts.text: 🚨 EY Data Breach - Hackers Gain Access to IT Support System and Download Documents Source: https://cybersecuritynews.com/ey-data-breach/ Ernst & Young LLP (EY) is notifying clients that an unauthorized third party breached a support ticket platform used by its IT staff, downloading documents containing client tax data during a roughly two-week window this spring. The Big Four accounting and consulting giant filed breach notifications with the California Attorney General's office on July 15, 2026, confirming the incident's scope. According to EY's notification letter dated July 13, 2026, the firm uses a third-party IT service management platform to help its information technology personnel support internal teams handling tax-related client work. #cybersecuritynews #Databreach
posts.text_zh: 🚨 安永資料外洩 - 駭客取得 IT 支援系統存取權限並下載文件 來源：https://cybersecuritynews.com/ey-data-breach/ 安永會計師事務所 (EY) 通知客戶，未經授權的第三方入侵了其 IT 員工使用的支援票證平台，在今年春天大約兩週的時間內下載了包含客戶稅務資料的文件。這家四大會計和諮詢巨頭於 2026 年 7 月 15 日向加州總檢察長辦公室提交了違規通知，確認了事件的範圍。根據安永2026年7月13日的通知函，該公司使用第三方IT服務管理平台來協助其資訊科技人員支援處理涉稅客戶工作的內部團隊。 #網路安全新聞#資料洩露

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨🇺🇸 FBI arrests Florida man accused of using malware-laced Steam games to drain crypto wallets Federal authorities arrested 21-year-old Zyaire Wilkins over an alleged scheme that distributed eight malware-infected video games between May 2024 and February 2026. The games allegedly infected around 8,000 devices, compromised approximately 80 cryptocurrency wallets, and stole at least $220,000. Titles linked to the investigation include BlockBlasters, Chemia, Dashverse, DashFPS, Lampy, Lunara, PirateFi, and Tokenova. Prosecutors say the games were promoted through Discord, Telegram, X, LinkedIn, and targeted messages sent to people believed to hold large amounts of cryptocurrency. Investigators allegedly identified Wilkins by tracing Bitcoin spent on more than 150 gift cards, including Uber Eats cards connected to deliveries made to his addresses. Wilkins is charged with conspiracy to obtain information by computer for private financial gain.
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇺🇸 FBI 逮捕了一名佛羅裡達州男子，他被控使用含有惡意軟體的 Steam 遊戲來榨乾加密錢包聯邦當局逮捕了 21 歲的 Zyaire Wilkins，原因是他涉嫌在 2024 年 5 月至 2026 年 2 月期間分發 8 款受惡意軟體感染的視頻遊戲。這些遊戲據稱感染了大約 8,000 台設備，入侵了大約 80 個加密貨幣錢包，並竊取了至少 22 萬美元。與調查相關的遊戲包括 BlockBlasters、Chemia、Dashverse、DashFPS、Lampy、Lunara、PirateFi 和 Tokenova。檢察官表示，這些遊戲是透過 Discord、Telegram、X、LinkedIn 進行推廣的，並向據信持有大量加密貨幣的人發送有針對性的信息。據稱，調查人員透過追蹤在 150 多張禮品卡上花費的比特幣來識別威爾金斯的身份，其中包括與向其地址送貨相關的 Uber Eats 優食卡。威爾金斯被指控串謀透過電腦獲取資訊以獲取私人經濟利益。

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: R to @The_Cyber_News: LegacyHive lets a low‑privileged user mount another user’s registry hive, specifically the UsrClass.dat hive, into their own HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT, exposing that other user’s application data and configuration as if it were their own. Source: https://cybersecuritynews.com/windows-legacyhive-0-day-vulnerability/
posts.text_zh: R 致@The_Cyber​​_News：LegacyHive 允許低權限用戶將另一個用戶的註冊表配置單元（特別是 UsrClass.dat 配置單元）安裝到他們自己的 HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT 中，從而暴露其他用戶的應用程式資料和配置，就好像它是他們自己的一樣。來源：https://cybersecuritynews.com/windows-legacyhive-0-day-vulnerability/

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: 🚨 A fake coding test can be the whole attack. North Korea-linked hackers are hiding malware across ordinary-looking SVG flag images. Run the project, and it assembles an OtterCookie-aligned toolkit that steals browser credentials, crypto wallet data, files, and clipboard contents, then opens a SocketIO backdoor. Read the full attack chain: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/north-korea-linked-hackers-hide.html
posts.text_zh: 🚨 虛假的編碼測試可能就是整個攻擊。與北韓有關的駭客在看似普通的 SVG 旗幟圖像中隱藏惡意軟體。運行該項目，它會組裝一個與 OtterCookie 對齊的工具包，該工具包會竊取瀏覽器憑證、加密錢包資料、文件和剪貼簿內容，然後打開 SocketIO 後門。閱讀完整的攻擊鏈：https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/north-korea-linked-hackers-hide.html

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Sale of 4M São Paulo Student Records A darkweb forum post reveals that a threat actor known as 'Confia Company' is allegedly selling a database containing personal information of over 4 million students from the São Paulo State Department of Education (SEDUC-SP). The listing, posted on July 16, 2026, claims the data was extracted directly from the API of 'Sala do Futuro,' the official educational platform used by the state's public school system. According to the post, the dataset covers approximately 1,480 cities within São Paulo state and includes sensitive personally identifiable information (PII) for each student. The alleged exposed fields include: * Student ID and RA (Registration Number) * Full name * CPF (Brazilian national ID) and RG (state ID) * Date of birth and gender * Email addresses * Parents' full names * Complete home addresses (street, number, neighborhood, ZIP code, city, state) * Geolocation coordinates (latitude/longitude) * Class enrollment details The listing provides sample records showing data for students in cities such as São José dos Campos, São Paulo, Araraquara, and São Caetano do Sul, confirming the presence of CPFs, parent names, and precise address details. The actor invites interested buyers to contact them via Telegram or Session for pricing. São Paulo State is the largest education system in Brazil, serving millions of students annually. The exposure of such granular data, including geolocation and national identification numbers, poses significant risks of identity theft, social engineering, and physical safety threats to minors and their families. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by SEDUC-SP or security researchers. #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #Brazil #SaoPaulo #PII #DarkWeb #StudentData
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱出售 400 萬份聖保羅學生記錄 一篇暗網論壇帖子透露，一個名為“Confia Company”的威脅行為者涉嫌出售包含聖保羅州教育部 (SEDUC-SP) 超過 400 萬學生個人信息的數據庫。該清單發佈於 2026 年 7 月 16 日，聲稱數據直接從該州公立學校系統使用的官方教育平台「Sala do Futuro」的 API 中提取。根據該帖子，該資料集涵蓋聖保羅州內約 1,480 個城市，並包含每個學生的敏感個人識別資訊 (PII)。據稱暴露的欄位包括： * 學生 ID 和 RA（註冊號碼） * 全名 * CPF（巴西國民 ID）和 RG（州 ID） * 出生日期和性別 * 電子郵件地址 * 父母的全名 * 完整的家庭住址（街道、號碼、社區、郵政編碼、城市、州） * 地理位置座標（緯度/經度） * 班級註冊資訊該清單提供了範例記錄，顯示了聖若澤多斯坎普斯、聖奧多斯坎普斯等城市的學生資料聖保羅、阿拉拉誇拉和南聖卡埃塔諾，確認 CPF 的存在、父母姓名和準確的地址詳細資料。演員邀請有興趣的買家透過 Telegram 或 Session 與他們聯繫以獲取定價。聖保羅州是巴西最大的教育系統，每年為數百萬名學生提供服務。此類精細資料（包括地理位置和國民身分證號碼）的暴露會為未成年人及其家人帶來身分盜竊、社會工程和人身安全威脅的重大風險。截至報告時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 SEDUC-SP 或安全研究人員的獨立驗證。 #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #巴西 #SaoPaulo #PII #DarkWeb #StudentData

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: 🛡️ A Windows zero-day vulnerability, dubbed LegacyHive (MSNightmare), abuses the User Profile Service to enable local privilege escalation, tampering with administrator accounts, and admin-level code execution. The public proof‑of‑concept (PoC) from the MSNightmare GitHub account describes the bug as a “Windows user profile service arbitrary hive load elevation of privileges vulnerability.” Will Dormann demonstrated that by running LegacyHive.exe with a second standard user's credentials, specifying an administrator account name, and then starting regedit.exe as that second user, the non‑admin gains direct access to the administrator’s Classes. #cybersecuritynews
posts.text_zh: 🛡️ 一個名為 LegacyHive (MSNightmare) 的 Windows 零日漏洞，濫用使用者設定檔服務來實現本地權限升級、篡改管理員帳戶和執行管理員等級的程式碼。 MSNightmare GitHub 帳戶的公開概念驗證 (PoC) 將此錯誤描述為「Windows 使用者設定檔服務任意設定單元載入特權提升漏洞」。 Will Dormann 示範了透過使用第二個標準使用者的憑證執行 LegacyHive.exe，指定管理員帳戶名稱，然後作為第二個使用者啟動 regedit.exe，非管理員可以直接存取管理員的類別。 #網路安全新聞

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: Mindgard told @TheHackersNews that VS Code does not show this behavior and Cursor appears to have introduced it after the fork. He believes Cursor runs a bare git command on Windows, allowing a planted git.exe to execute from the project folder. The exact call path remains unverified. Last confirmed in Cursor 3.2.16:
posts.text_zh: Mindgard 告訴 @TheHackersNews，VS Code 沒有顯示此行為，而 Cursor 似乎是在分叉後引入的。他認為 Cursor 在 Windows 上執行一個裸露的 git 命令，允許植入的 git.exe 從專案資料夾中執行。確切的呼叫路徑尚未得到驗證。最後在 Cursor 3.2.16 中確認：

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: Military autonomy is not just a platform race. It is an information infrastructure challenge. Drones, vessels, satellites, AI systems, and allies must exchange trusted mission data across platforms and security domains. Why the future force depends on what connects it: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/the-race-to-field-military-autonomy-is.html
posts.text_zh: 軍事自主權不僅僅是一場平台競賽。這是資訊基礎設施的挑戰。無人機、船舶、衛星、人工智慧系統和盟友必須跨平台和安全域交換可信任的任​​務資料。為什麼未來的力量取決於連結它的因素：https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/the-race-to-field-military-autonomy-is.html

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: UPDATE: Cursor says the malicious git.exe flaw is out of scope for its bug bounty, arguing that users choose which repositories they open. It says the issue affects Windows only, recommends Workspace Trust, and admits it failed to respond to the researcher in time. No fix was announced: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/cursor-flaw-lets-malicious-cloned.html
posts.text_zh: 更新：Cursor 表示惡意 git.exe 缺陷超出了其漏洞賞金範圍，並認為使用者可以選擇開啟哪些儲存庫。它表示該問題僅影響 Windows，推薦 Workspace Trust，並承認其未能及時回覆研究人員。沒有宣布修復：https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/cursor-flaw-lets-malicious-cloned.html

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: R to @The_Cyber_News: The malware specifically searches for Telegram Desktop’s tdata directory in the victim’s Library folder. It copies session-related files, including key_datas, maps, and matching s files, stages them in a temporary location, compresses the collection, and uploads it with other stolen information. Source: https://cybersecuritynews.com/hackers-crack-telegram-2fa/
posts.text_zh: R 至 @The_Cyber​​_News：該惡意軟體專門在受害者的 Library 資料夾中搜尋 Telegram Desktop 的 tdata 目錄。它複製與會話相關的文件，包括 key_datas、地圖和匹配文件，將它們存放在臨時位置，壓縮集合，並將其與其他被盜資訊一起上傳。資料來源：https://cybersecuritynews.com/hackers-crack-telegram-2fa/

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: ❗️❗️A macOS information-stealing malware is turning stolen Telegram desktop data into immediate account access. Instead of guessing passwords or breaking two-factor authentication, it copies the local files that prove a user has already logged in. When those files are restored on another Mac, Telegram can open and synchronize chats without showing its usual login screen. The operation reaches well beyond Telegram. The malware collects macOS Keychain data, browser credentials and cookies, Apple Notes, and cryptocurrency wallet databases, then uses fake password prompts to obtain working system passwords. This broad approach resembles other macOS-focused threats that seek browser and Keychain material before sending stolen data to an operator.
posts.text_zh: ❗️❗️macOS 資訊竊取惡意軟體正在將被盜的 Telegram 桌面資料轉化為即時帳戶存取權限。它不會猜測密碼或破壞雙重認證，而是複製證明使用者已登入的本機檔案。當這些檔案在另一台 Mac 上恢復時，Telegram 可以開啟並同步聊天，而無需顯示其通常的登入畫面。該行動的範圍遠遠超出了 Telegram 的範圍。該惡意軟體收集 macOS 鑰匙串資料、瀏覽器憑證和 cookie、Apple Notes 和加密貨幣錢包資料庫，然後使用虛假密碼提示來取得工作系統密碼。這種廣泛的方法類似於其他以 macOS 為重點的威脅，這些威脅在將竊取的資料傳送給操作員之前會尋找瀏覽器和鑰匙圈資料。

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: I have made the decision to suspend Cyber Toufan, the hacktivist group, from my Mastodon instance. They only had one post. This is not an expression of support for Israeli government, who the UN say have committed genocide in Gaza. The UK government has announced later this week they will designate the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) as a threat to national security as part of the National Security (State Threats) Act, and I cannot be sure Cyber Toufan aren't connected to them.
posts.text_zh: 我已决定从我的 Mastodon 实例中暂停 Cyber​​ Toufan（黑客组织）。他們只有一個職位。这并不是对以色列政府的支持，联合国称以色列政府在加沙犯下了种族灭绝罪。英國政府本週稍後宣布，作為《國家安全（國家威脅）法案》的一部分，他們將指定伊斯蘭革命衛隊 (IRGC) 對國家安全構成威脅，我不能確定 Cyber​​ Toufan 與他們沒有聯繫。

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: R to @TheHackersNews: The risky setup is an agent that can both read untrusted mail and write durable memory without asking. OpenClaw advises using a separate email reader with no memory, file, or shell tools, then passing only a summary to the main agent.
posts.text_zh: R 致@TheHackersNews：有風險的設定是一個代理，它可以在不詢問的情況下讀取不受信任的郵件並寫入持久記憶體。 OpenClaw 建議使用沒有記憶體、檔案或 shell 工具的單獨電子郵件閱讀器，然後僅將摘要傳遞給主代理。

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: ⚡ MemGhost AI memory attack has now been tested through #Gmail, beyond the original lab setup. Researchers told @TheHackersNews they sent poisoned emails from a normal Gmail account to #OpenClaw. The agent read them, and more than half of the tests ended with the payload saved to persistent memory without explicit notice or approval. Some variants were blocked or sent to spam.
posts.text_zh: ⚡ MemGhost AI 記憶體攻擊現已通過 #Gmail 進行了測試，超出了原始實驗室設定。研究人員告訴@TheHackersNews，他們從正常的 Gmail 帳戶向#OpenClaw 發送了有毒的電子郵件。代理讀取它們，超過一半的測試以將有效負載保存到持久記憶體中而結束，而沒有明確通知或批准。某些變體被阻止或發送到垃圾郵件。

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: Following up the Delinea situation, they have another planned outage this weekend to update to version 26.1 HF2 of the product. https:// status.delinea.com/incidents/m 2gzxlt6rs6g HF2 isn't available yet: https:// docs.delinea.com/online-help/c loud-suite/release-notes/cloud-suite/26.1.htm#ResolvedIssuesin261HF1 The prior outage situation for "security patches" never had a CVE allocated or details about what was patched. If you're in the media you might want to ask them what was patched.
posts.text_zh: 繼 Delinea 的情況之後，他們在本週末再次計劃停機，以更新到產品的 26.1 HF2 版本。 https://status.delinea.com/incidents/m 2gzxlt6rs6g HF2 尚不可用：https://docs.delinea.com/online-help/cloud-suite/release-notes/cloud-suite/26.1.htm#ResolvedIssuesin261HF1 “中斷的安全性”之前有關補丁的內容。如果您是媒體人士，您可能想問他們修補了什麼。

posts.name: TheHackersNews
posts.text: 🔥 European Union (EU) has ordered Google to open #Android features to rival AI assistants, including the camera, microphone, screen contents, locked-screen hotwords, and background app control. Consent still applies. For six features, Google cannot require certification. Here's what changes, and when - https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/eu-orders-google-to-open-android-mic.html
posts.text_zh: 🔥 歐盟 (EU) 已命令 Google 向競爭對手的 AI 助理開放 #Android 功能，包括攝影機、麥克風、螢幕內容、鎖定螢幕熱字和後台應用程式控制。同意仍然適用。對於六項功能，Google 不能要求認證。以下是變更的內容以及時間 - https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/eu-orders-google-to-open-android-mic.html

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Threat Actor Claims 605M Pakistan CNIC Records Leaked on Darkweb A darkweb forum post reveals the alleged exposure of a massive dataset containing 605 million rows of Pakistani citizen data, combining national identity records with historical telecom information. The actor, operating under the handle "PKMKB," claims to have compiled this dataset over more than a decade by merging older leaked telecom directories and provincial agency breaches. According to the listing, the exposed data includes highly sensitive Personally Identifiable Information (PII) and tracking details: * **Core National Identity Data:** 13-digit Computerized National Identity Card (CNIC) numbers, full legal names, gender, dates of birth, and family tree links including parentage. * **Telecom Trackers:** Active and historically registered mobile numbers mapped to specific IDs, SIM card issuance dates with exact activation timestamps, and network operator data for carriers such as Jazz, Telenor, Zong, and Ufone. * **Locational Data:** Permanent and temporary home and work addresses submitted during CNIC registrations, along with city and district routing information. The post alleges that half of the dataset is available for free via a Telegram bot, while the full archive is offered for sale. Pakistan’s National Database and Registration Authority (NADRA) manages the CNIC system for a population of over 240 million people. While the claimed volume of 605 million rows exceeds the country's population, the actor attributes this to overlapping historical records and multi-generational telecom mappings. If authentic, the exposure of comprehensive identity and telecom records could facilitate large-scale identity theft, financial fraud, and targeted harassment across Pakistan. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by NADRA or security researchers. #DataBreach #Pakistan #CNIC #IdentityTheft #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 威脅行為者聲稱 6.05 億巴基斯坦 CNIC 記錄在暗網上洩露 一篇暗網論壇帖子揭露了包含 6.05 億行巴基斯坦公民數據的海量數據集的洩露，該數據集將國民身份記錄與歷史電信信息相結合。該攻擊者以「PKMKB」為名，聲稱透過合併舊的洩漏的電信目錄和省級機構的違規行為，在十多年來編制了該資料集。根據清單，暴露的資料包括高度敏感的個人識別資訊 (PII) 和追蹤詳細資料：* **核心國民身分資料：** 13 位電腦化國民身分證 (CNIC) 號碼、法定全名、性別、出生日期以及包括出身的家譜連結。 * **電信追蹤器：** 映射到特定 ID 的活躍和歷史註冊手機號碼、具有準確激活時間戳的 SIM 卡發行日期以及 Jazz、Telenor、Zong 和 Ufone 等運營商的網路運營商數據。 * **位置資料：** CNIC 註冊期間提交的永久和臨時家庭和工作地址，以及城市和地區的路線資訊。該貼文聲稱一半的資料集可透過 Telegram 機器人免費取得，而完整的檔案則可供出售。巴基斯坦國家資料庫和註冊局 (NADRA) 管理著超過 2.4 億人口的 CNIC 系統。雖然聲稱的 6.05 億行數據量超過了該國的人口數量，但該行為者將其歸因於重疊的歷史記錄和多代電信映射。如果屬實，全面的身份和電信記錄的暴露可能會助長巴基斯坦各地的大規模身份盜竊、金融詐欺和有針對性的騷擾。截至本報告發佈時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 NADRA 或安全研究人員的獨立核實。 #DataBreach #巴基斯坦 #CNIC #IdentityTheft #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Sale of Coinbase Customer Data on Darkweb Forum A post on an underground forum alleges the availability of a database containing personal and financial information of Coinbase users. The actor claims the data, described as "2026 Crypto Leads," includes balance information and contact details for individuals worldwide. According to the listing, the dataset contains the following fields: * Name * Email * Address * Postal Code * City * Phone Number * International Phone Number * Confirmation Status * Company * Rent Information * Interest Details * Country * Crypto Platform * Crypto Balance The threat actor asserts that the source of this data is a combination of internal API leaks and compromised merchant processors. The post indicates that the data is available for purchase globally, with the seller requesting direct messages for further details. Coinbase is one of the largest cryptocurrency exchanges in the world, serving millions of users across numerous countries. A breach of this scale would represent a significant security incident for the fintech giant, potentially exposing sensitive financial profiles to fraudsters. At the time of reporting, Coinbase has not commented on the alleged leak, and the incident has not been independently verified.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱在暗網論壇上出售 Coinbase 客戶資料 地下論壇上的一篇貼文聲稱存在包含 Coinbase 用戶個人和財務資訊的資料庫。該行為者聲稱，這些被描述為「2026 Crypto Leads」的數據包括世界各地個人的餘額資訊和聯絡資訊。根據清單，該資料集包含以下欄位： * 姓名 * 電子郵件 * 地址 * 郵遞區號 * 城市 * 電話號碼 * 國際電話號碼 * 確認狀態 * 公司 * 租金資訊 * 興趣詳細資料 * 國家 * 加密平台 * 加密餘額 威脅行為者聲稱該資料的來源是內部 API 洩漏和受損的商家處理器的組合。該貼文表明，該數據可在全球範圍內購買，賣家需要直接發送訊息以獲取更多詳細資訊。 Coinbase 是世界上最大的加密貨幣交易所之一，為多個國家的數百萬用戶提供服務。對於這家金融科技巨頭來說，如此規模的違規行為將構成重大安全事件，並可能將敏感的財務資料暴露給詐欺者。截至發稿時，Coinbase 尚未對涉嫌洩密事件發表評論，該事件也尚未獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Leak of SpaceX Starshield Internal Architecture Document A post on an underground forum alleges the exposure of an internal technical document related to SpaceX’s Starshield program, a secure satellite constellation designed for government and defense applications. The listing claims to offer access to a 22-page document titled "Starshield Constellation Technical Baseline and Architecture Description," bearing the document number SPX-STARS HLD-LIN-2026-042 and dated June 12, 2026. The file is marked with watermarks indicating "SPACE PROPRIETARY / STARSHIELD PROGRAM / INTERNAL USE ONLY." According to the post, the document provides a detailed technical baseline and architecture description of the Starshield network. The actor claims the content covers several critical aspects of the system: * Constellation architecture and orbital design * Satellite bus design, subsystems, and physical characteristics * Payload integration and hosted payload capabilities * Secure communications and inter-satellite links * Ground segment and user terminal integration * Launch vehicles, deployment strategy, and on-orbit operations * Operational status, performance metrics, and lessons learned The listing describes the material as valuable for aerospace engineers, defense researchers, and investors, suggesting it offers rare insights into SpaceX’s secure satellite infrastructure. Starshield is a significant component of SpaceX’s broader strategy in the space and defense sectors, providing secure communications and Earth observation capabilities for government clients. If authentic, the exposure of such internal architectural details could provide adversaries with insights into the physical and operational design of secure satellite networks, potentially aiding in the development of countermeasures or targeted attacks against critical space infrastructure. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified, and the authenticity of the document remains unconfirmed.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱 SpaceX Starshield 內部架構文件被洩露 地下論壇上的一篇帖子聲稱，與 SpaceX Starshield 計劃相關的內部技術文件被曝光，該計劃是一個專為政府和國防應用而設計的安全衛星星座。該清單聲稱可以存取一份名為「Starshield Constellation Technical Baseline and Architecture Description」的 22 頁文件，文件編號為 SPX-STARS HLD-LIN-2026-042，日期為 2026 年 6 月 12 日。該文件標有浮水印，指示「太空專有/STARSHIELD 計劃/僅供內部使用」。貼文稱，該文件提供了 Starshield 網路的詳細技術基準和架構描述。該演員聲稱內容涵蓋了該系統的幾個關鍵方面： * 星座架構和軌道設計 * 衛星總線設計、子系統和物理特性 * 有效載荷集成和託管有效載荷能力 * 安全通信和衛星間鏈路 * 地面部分和用戶終端集成 * 運載火箭、部署策略和在航空操作工程師 運行狀態、性能指標和經驗教訓X的安全衛星基礎設施提供了罕見的見解。 Starshield 是 SpaceX 在太空和國防部門更廣泛戰略的重要組成部分，為政府客戶提供安全通訊和地球觀測能力。如果屬實，此類內部架構細節的暴露可以讓對手深入了解安全衛星網路的實體和操作設計，可能有助於制定針對關鍵太空基礎設施的對策或有針對性的攻擊。截至報告時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到獨立核實，該文件的真實性仍未得到證實。

posts.name: threatintel
posts.text: #ThreatProtection ShadowRecruit targets Indian job seekers, deploying SheetAgent RAT and ControlR for access. Read more about Symantec's protection: https://www.broadcom.com/support/security-center/protection-bulletin/operation-shadowrecruit-deploys-rmm-and-sheetagent-rat
posts.text_zh: #ThreatProtection ShadowRecruit 針對印度求職者，部署 SheetAgent RAT 和 ControlR 進行存取。了解更多關於賽門鐵克防護的資訊：https://www.broadcom.com/support/security-center/protection-bulletin/operation-shadowrecruit-deploys-rmm-and-sheetagent-rat

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: R to @The_Cyber_News: The issue began at approximately 7:38 PM PDT on July 16, according to AWS. Initial updates said engineering teams were investigating why Cost Explorer was reflecting inaccurate estimated billing information. More Details : https://cybersecuritynews.com/aws-cost-explorer-bug/
posts.text_zh: R 致 @The_Cyber​​_News：據 AWS 稱，該問題於太平洋夏令時間 7 月 16 日晚上 7:38 左右開始。初步更新稱，工程團隊正在調查 Cost Explorer 反映的估計帳單資訊不準確的原因。更多詳細資訊：https://cybersecuritynews.com/aws-cost-explorer-bug/

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: AWS customers worldwide were startled after the AWS Billing and Cost Management Console and Cost Explorer began displaying extraordinarily high projected cloud costs. Some organizations reported estimated monthly bills reaching trillions of dollars, triggering budget alerts and prompting concerns over potential unauthorized AWS usage. AWS confirmed the issue through its Health Dashboard and AWS Support account on X, stressing that the inaccurate figures are limited to estimated billing data. The company said actual charges and verified usage records remain unaffected.
posts.text_zh: AWS 帳單和成本管理主控台和 Cost Explorer 開始顯示極高的預期雲端成本後，全球 AWS 客戶都感到震驚。一些組織報告估計每月帳單達到數萬億美元，觸發預算警報並引發對潛在未經授權的 AWS 使用的擔憂。 AWS 透過 X 上的 Health Dashboard 和 AWS Support 帳戶確認了該問題，並強調不準確的數字僅限於估計的帳單資料。該公司表示，實際費用和經過驗證的使用記錄不受影響。

posts.name: threatintel
posts.text: #ThreatProtection Microsoft has disclosed CVE-2026-56155, a high-severity local privilege escalation flaw in Active Directory Federation Services (AD FS) that is actively exploited in the wild. Read more about Symantec's protection: https://www.broadcom.com/support/security-center/protection-bulletin/active-directory-federation-services-privilege-escalation-flaw-cve-2026-56155
posts.text_zh: #ThreatProtection Microsoft 已揭露 CVE-2026-56155，這是 Active Directory 聯合身分驗證服務 (AD FS) 中的一個高嚴重性本地權限升級缺陷，該缺陷在野外被積極利用。了解更多有關賽門鐵克保護的資訊：https://www.broadcom.com/support/security-center/protection-bulletin/active-directory-federation-services-privilege-escalation-flaw-cve-2026-56155

posts.name: threatintel
posts.text: #ThreatProtection TuxBot v3 is a new IoT botnet framework built with LLM-generated code. It targets 17 device architectures for DDoS attacks. Read more about Symantec's protection: https://www.broadcom.com/support/security-center/protection-bulletin/tuxbot-v3-targets-iot-for-ddos-operations
posts.text_zh: #ThreatProtection TuxBot v3 是一個使用 LLM 產生的程式碼建構的新 IoT 殭屍網路框架。它針對 17 種裝置架構進行 DDoS 攻擊。了解更多關於賽門鐵克保護的資訊：https://www.broadcom.com/support/security-center/protection-bulletin/tuxbot-v3-targets-iot-for-ddos-operations

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: R to @The_Cyber_News: Successful exploitation can enable attackers to run arbitrary commands on vulnerable devices without needing valid credentials. CVE-2026-39808 affects Fortinet FortiSandbox directly. More Details: https://cybersecuritynews.com/fortisandbox-vulnerabilities-exploited/
posts.text_zh: R 至 @The_Cyber​​_News：成功利用該漏洞可以使攻擊者無需有效憑證即可在易受攻擊的裝置上執行任意命令。 CVE-2026-39808 直接影響 Fortinet FortiSandbox。更多詳細資訊：https://cybersecuritynews.com/fortisandbox-vulnerability-exploited/

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: CISA has added two critical Fortinet FortiSandbox vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog, warning that attackers are actively exploiting the flaws in real-world attacks. The vulnerabilities, identified as CVE-2026-39808 and CVE-2026-25089, allow unauthenticated attackers to execute unauthorized operating system commands through specially crafted HTTP requests. Both issues are classified as OS command injection vulnerabilities, which occur when an application fails to properly sanitize user-controlled input.
posts.text_zh: CISA 已在其已知利用漏洞 (KEV) 目錄中添加了兩個關鍵的 Fortinet FortiSandbox 漏洞，警告攻擊者正在積極利用現實世界攻擊中的缺陷。這些漏洞編號為 CVE-2026-39808 和 CVE-2026-25089，允許未經驗證的攻擊者透過特製的 HTTP 請求執行未經授權的作業系統命令。這兩個問題都被歸類為作業系統命令注入漏洞，當應用程式無法正確清理使用者控制的輸入時就會發生這種情況。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇷 São Paulo State Education Platform Data Allegedly Offered for Sale A threat actor claims to be selling more than 4 million student records allegedly extracted from the official "Sala do Futuro" platform operated by the São Paulo State Department of Education (SEDUC-SP). * The actor claims to possess 4,068,441 student records * The data was allegedly extracted directly from an API * Claimed fields include student IDs, full names, CPF/RG numbers, dates of birth, gender, email addresses, parents' names, home addresses, geolocation coordinates, and class enrollment information * The listing claims the dataset covers schools across the State of São Paulo * At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from SEDUC-SP regarding the alleged breach Analyst Note: If authentic, the exposure of education records containing national ID numbers, family information, and precise location data would present significant privacy and identity theft risks. Such datasets are also frequently abused in phishing, fraud, and social engineering campaigns targeting students, parents, and educational institutions. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Brazil
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇷 據稱出售聖保羅州教育平台數據 一名威脅行為者聲稱出售超過 400 萬份學生記錄，據稱這些記錄是從聖保羅州教育部 (SEDUC-SP) 運營的官方“Sala do Futuro”平台中提取的。 * 該行為者聲稱擁有 4,068,441 筆學生記錄 * 據稱這些資料是直接從 API 中提取的 * 聲稱的欄位包括學生 ID、全名、CPF/RG 號碼、出生日期、性別、電子郵件地址、父母姓名、家庭住址、地理位置座標和班級註冊資訊 * 該聲稱資料集涵蓋聖保羅州的學校揭露.分析師註：如果屬實，則該曝光資訊包含國民身分證號碼、家庭資訊和精確位置資料的教育記錄將帶來重大的隱私和身分盜竊風險。此類資料集也經常在針對學生、家長和教育機構的網路釣魚、詐欺和社會工程活動中被濫用。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #巴西

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇭🇳 Threat Actor Claims Sale of 70,000 Payment Cards from Alleged SQL Injection Attack A threat actor is advertising the sale of approximately 70,000 payment card records, claiming they were obtained by exploiting an SQL injection vulnerability on a Honduran company's website. * The actor claims the database contains approximately 70,000 payment cards * Allegedly exposed data includes card numbers, cardholder names, expiration dates, and CVV values * The seller claims to have proof of the vulnerability and is offering evidence to serious buyers * The affected organization has not been identified in the advertisement * At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation of the alleged compromise Analyst Note: If authentic, the presence of full payment card data, including CVV values, would indicate a severe compromise of payment information. Organizations handling cardholder data should ensure PCI DSS compliance, eliminate SQL injection vulnerabilities through secure coding practices, and avoid storing sensitive authentication data such as CVVs after authorization. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Honduras
posts.text_zh: 🇭🇳 威脅行為者聲稱透過 SQL 注入攻擊出售了 70,000 張支付卡 威脅行為者正在宣傳出售大約 70,000 條支付卡記錄，聲稱這些記錄是透過利用洪都拉斯公司網站上的 SQL 注入漏洞獲得的。 * 攻擊者聲稱資料庫包含約 70,000 張支付卡 * 據稱暴露的資料包括卡號、持卡人姓名、到期日期和 CVV 值 * 賣家聲稱擁有該漏洞的證據，並向認真的買家提供證據 * 廣告中尚未確定受影響的組織 * 截至撰寫本文時，尚未對所謂的洩露資訊進行公開確認 分析師 * 廣告中尚未確定受影響的組織 * 截至撰寫本文時，尚未對所謂的資料外洩露 分析師處理持卡人資料的組織應確保 PCI DSS 合規性，透過安全編碼實踐消除 SQL 注入漏洞，並避免在授權後儲存 CVV 等敏感身份驗證資料。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Honduras

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Pinned: Critical Oracle E-Business Suite flaw is under active exploitation CISA confirmed active exploitation of CVE-2026-46817, a critical Oracle E-Business Suite vulnerability affecting the Oracle Payments File Transmission component. The flaw allows an unauthenticated attacker with HTTP access to compromise Oracle Payments and potentially take over vulnerable systems. More than 1,000 internet-exposed Oracle EBS instances were being tracked, although the number vulnerable or already compromised is unknown. U.S. federal agencies were ordered to remediate by July 18, 2026. #DDW #Vulnerability #Exploitation #oracle
posts.text_zh: 已修正：嚴重的 Oracle 電子商務套件漏洞正在被積極利用 CISA 已確認 CVE-2026-46817 正在被積極利用，這是一個影響 Oracle 支付文件傳輸元件的重要 Oracle 電子商務套件漏洞。此缺陷允許未經身份驗證的攻擊者透過 HTTP 存取來破壞 Oracle Payments 並可能接管易受攻擊的系統。超過 1,000 個暴露在互聯網上的 Oracle EBS 實例正在被跟踪，但易受攻擊或已經受到損害的數量尚不清楚。美國聯邦機構被勒令在 2026 年 7 月 18 日之前進行修復。 #DDW #Vulnerability #Exploitation #oracle

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: R to @DailyDarkWeb: Update: Romania’s national land-registry agency confirms a cyberattack as stolen-data claims surface Romania’s National Agency for Cadastre and Land Registration, ANCPI, confirmed that its e-Terra land-registry platform was hit by a cyberattack after initially describing the outage as a major technical incident. ANCPI says the data it administers was not compromised. Separately, a threat actor using the name ByteToBreach claims to have stolen citizen and agency databases, copied GitLab repositories and source code, and deployed ransomware before advertising the alleged data on a dark web forum.
posts.text_zh: R 致 @DailyDarkWeb：更新：羅馬尼亞國家土地登記機構確認遭到網路攻擊，因為資料被盜索賠浮出水面 羅馬尼亞國家地籍和土地登記機構 (ANCPI) 最初​​將此次故障描述為重大技術事件，並確認其 e-Terra 土地登記平台遭到網路攻擊。 ANCPI 表示其管理的數據並未受到損害。另外，一個名為 ByteToBreach 的威脅行為者聲稱竊取了公民和機構資料庫，複製了 GitLab 儲存庫和原始程式碼，並部署了勒索軟體，然後在暗網論壇上宣傳所指控的資料。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇱🇰 Sri Lanka Customs Data Allegedly Leaked — 250,000+ Shipment Records Claimed A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a full export of Sri Lanka Customs shipment manifests, allegedly containing more than 250,000 records and offering additional "live feed" access. * The actor claims the data was exfiltrated from Sri Lanka Customs internal servers * The advertised dataset allegedly covers approximately 18 months of import activity * Claimed records include bill of lading numbers, container identifiers, shipper and buyer details, logistics information, and invoice-related fields * The post also advertises ongoing access to future shipment data and claims similar datasets from other countries are available upon request * At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from Sri Lanka Customs regarding these claims Analyst Note: If authentic, customs manifest data could expose sensitive supply chain relationships, shipment movements, and commercial trade intelligence. Such information could be leveraged for cargo theft, supply chain targeting, corporate espionage, or highly tailored phishing campaigns against logistics and import/export organizations. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #SriLanka
posts.text_zh: 🇱🇰 斯里蘭卡海關數據涉嫌洩露 — 聲稱有 250,000 多條貨運記錄威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱的斯里蘭卡海關貨運清單的完整出口，據稱包含超過 250,000 條記錄，並提供額外的“實時反饋”訪問權限。 * 該行為者聲稱這些數據是從斯里蘭卡海關內部伺服器中竊取的 * 廣告數據集據稱涵蓋了大約 18 個月的進口活動 * 聲稱的記錄包括提單號、集裝箱標識符、托運人和買方詳細信息、物流信息和發票相關字段 * 該帖子還宣傳了對未來貨運數據的持續訪問，並聲稱可根據要求提供來自斯里蘭卡的此類聲明，對未來貨運數據的持續訪問數據分析師註：如果真實，海關艙單資料可能會暴露敏感的供應鏈關係、貨運動態和商業貿易情報。此類資訊可用於貨物盜竊、供應鏈目標、企業間諜活動或針對物流和進出口組織的高度客製化的網路釣魚活動。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #SriLanka

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇮🇩 PNB (Bali State Polytechnic) Student Data Allegedly Leaked A threat actor has claimed to have leaked student records belonging to PNB (Politeknik Negeri Bali), affecting data from the 2023–2025 academic years. * The dataset allegedly contains student information from 2023–2025 * The sample shared by the actor includes student names, registration numbers, email addresses, and WhatsApp numbers * Additional fields may be present in the full dataset, but this has not been independently verified * At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from PNB regarding the alleged breach Analyst Note: Educational institutions remain attractive targets due to the large volumes of personally identifiable information (PII) they maintain. Even limited student datasets can enable phishing, identity fraud, and social engineering campaigns targeting students and staff. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia
posts.text_zh: 🇮🇩 PNB（巴厘島州立理工學院）學生資料據稱洩露 一名威脅行為者聲稱洩露了 PNB（巴厘島理工學院）的學生記錄，影響了 2023-2025 學年的數據。 * 據稱，該資料集包含 2023 年至 2025 年的學生資訊 * 攻擊者共享的樣本包括學生姓名、註冊號碼、電子郵件地址和 WhatsApp 號碼 * 完整資料集中可能存在其他字段，但這尚未得到獨立驗證 * 截至撰寫本文時，PNB 尚未就涉嫌違規事件進行公開確認 分析師：教育機構仍然是大量的目標，因為分析師即使學生資料集有限，也可能導致針對學生和教職員的網路釣魚、身分詐欺和社會工程活動。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: ⚠️ Accor Allegedly Breached — 162,000+ Customer Records Offered for Sale A threat actor claims to have compromised Accor, the France-based global hospitality group, after gaining access to an employee account. * The actor allegedly accessed an internal Accor tool named “LUKE” * 162,437 customer records were reportedly collected * The exposed sample allegedly contains customer-related information * The actor claims access to Accor’s internal network, corporate VPN, and additional systems * According to the post, Accor detected the scraping activity and terminated the session before a larger extraction could be completed The claim is currently based on the threat actor’s forum post and sample data. We have not identified a public confirmation from Accor. Analyst Note: The actor’s own statement suggests that internal monitoring detected the abnormal activity. However, a compromised employee identity allegedly provided access beyond a single application, highlighting the risks of excessive privileges and insufficient identity segmentation. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Accor
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 雅高酒店據稱遭到洩露 — 162,000 多條客戶記錄可供出售 一名威脅行為者聲稱，在獲得員工帳戶的訪問權限後，已經危害了總部位於法國的全球酒店集團雅高酒店集團。 * 據稱，攻擊者訪問了名為“LUKE”的 Accor 內部工具 * 據報道收集了 162,437 條客戶記錄 * 據稱暴露的樣本包含客戶相關信息 * 攻擊者聲稱可以訪問 Accor 的內部網絡、企業 VPN 和其他系統 * 根據該帖子，Accor 檢測到了抓取活動並在更大規模的提取數據之前終止了攻擊者的聲明 該聲明。我們尚未確認雅高集團的公開確認資訊。分析師註釋：該行為者自己的聲明表明內部監控檢測到了異常活動。然而，據稱，受損的員工身分提供了超出單一應用程式的存取權限，凸顯了權限過多和身分分段不足的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Accor

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇺🇸 Massive U.S. Job Seeker Database Allegedly Offered for Sale on Dark Web A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database containing information on 16 million U.S. job seekers, including approximately 11 million original resumes totaling around 1 TB of data. According to the listing, the dataset allegedly spans more than 20 years and contains personally identifiable information (PII) along with original resume documents. The actor claims both historical and recent records are included, although there is currently insufficient evidence to independently verify the authenticity, source, or completeness of the data. The alleged dataset includes: * Full names * Email addresses * Phone numbers * Street addresses * City, state, and ZIP code * Resume metadata * Original resume filenames * Original resume documents (PDF/DOC/DOCX) * Registration and update timestamps At the time of writing, no organization has publicly confirmed ownership of the alleged dataset or the claimed compromise. * Country: United States 🇺🇸 * Alleged records: 16 million * Alleged data size: ~1 TB * Status: Unverified claim Analyst Note: Large collections of resume data are highly valuable to threat actors. Beyond identity theft, such datasets enable highly convincing spear-phishing campaigns, recruitment scams, business email compromise, and AI-powered social engineering by providing extensive professional and personal context on victims. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA
posts.text_zh: 🇺🇸 據稱在暗網上出售大量美國求職者資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱的資料庫，其中包含 1600 萬美國求職者的信息，其中包括約 1100 萬份原始簡歷，總數據量約為 1 TB。根據清單，該資料集據稱跨越 20 多年，包含個人識別資訊 (PII) 以及原始履歷文件。該行為者聲稱歷史和最近的記錄都包括在內，儘管目前沒有足夠的證據來獨立驗證資料的真實性、來源或完整性。所指控的資料集包括： * 全名 * 電子郵件地址 * 電話號碼 * 街道地址 * 城市、州和郵政編碼 * 簡歷元數據 * 原始簡歷文件名 * 原始簡歷文檔 (PDF/DOC/DOCX) * 註冊和更新時間戳 在撰寫本文時，沒有任何組織公開確認所指控的數據集或所聲稱的妥協的所有權。 * 國家：美國 🇺🇸 * 涉嫌記錄：1600 萬條 * 涉嫌資料大小：~1 TB * 狀態：未經驗證的聲明 分析師註釋：大量簡歷資料對威脅行為者來說非常有價值。除了身分盜竊之外，此類資料集還透過提供有關受害者的廣泛專業和個人背景，實現令人信服的魚叉式網路釣魚活動、招聘詐騙、商業電子郵件洩露和人工智慧驅動的社會工程。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: Two Hackers Jailed for Hacking 148 TfL Systems, Forcing Password Reset for 27,000 Staff | Source: https://cybersecuritynews.com/two-scattered-spider-hackers-jailed/ Two young members of the Scattered Spider cybercrime group have been jailed for a 2024 attack that knocked out 148 Transport for London (TfL) systems, forced all 27,000 staff to reset passwords in person, and cost the organization about £29 million. All 27,000 TfL employees had to visit an office for password resets. Critical systems needed manual workarounds. Data from the Oyster refunds system was accessed, leaving some customers waiting longer for money. TfL reported the incident to City of London Police’s Report Fraud service. #cybersecuritynews
posts.text_zh: 兩名駭客因入侵 148 個 TfL 系統、迫使 27,000 名員工重置密碼而被判入獄來源：https://cybersecuritynews.com/two-scattered-spider-hackers-jailed/ Scattered Spider 網路犯罪組織的兩名年輕成員因 2024 年的一次攻擊而被判入獄來源：該攻擊27,000 名員工親自重設密碼，並給該組織造成了約 2,900 萬英鎊的損失。所有 27,000 名倫敦交通局員工都必須前往辦公室重設密碼。關鍵系統需要手動解決方法。 Oyster 退款系統的數據被訪問，導致一些顧客等待退款的時間更長。倫敦交通局向倫敦市警察局的詐欺舉報服務部門報告了這起事件。 #網路安全新聞

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: ⚠️ 7-Zip Vulnerability Exposes Millions of Users to Remote Code Execution Risk Source: https://cybersecuritynews.com/7-zip-vulnerability-code-execution/ A newly disclosed vulnerability in 7-Zip, one of the most widely used open-source file archiving tools, could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected systems. Tracked as CVE-2026-14266, the flaw stems from improper handling of XZ chunked data and has been addressed in the latest software update. The vulnerability resides in how 7-Zip processes XZ-compressed data streams. Specifically, specially crafted XZ chunked data can trigger a heap-based buffer overflow, a memory corruption issue that occurs when data written to a buffer exceeds its allocated space. #cybersecuritynews #vulnerability
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 7-Zip 漏洞使數百萬用戶面臨遠端程式碼執行風險 來源：https://cybersecuritynews.com/7-zip-vulnerability-code-execution/ 7-Zip（最廣泛使用的開源檔案歸檔工具之一）中新披露的漏洞可能允許遠端攻擊者在受影響的系統上執行任意程式碼。此缺陷編號為 CVE-2026-14266，源自於 XZ 分塊資料的不當處理，已在最新的軟體更新中解決。此漏洞存在於 7-Zip 處理 XZ 壓縮資料流的方式中。具體來說，特製的 XZ 分塊資料可能會觸發基於堆疊的緩衝區溢出，這是當寫入緩衝區的資料超出其分配的空間時發生的記憶體損壞問題。 #網路安全新聞#漏洞

posts.name: MsftSecIntel
posts.text: Microsoft’s investigation into increased ACR Stealer activity surfaced two distinct intrusion paths that both begin with ClickFix, diverge in execution, but lead to the same outcome: the exfiltration of browser credentials, session tokens, and other sensitive data. https://msft.it/6016v2sXq One attack chain uses WebDAV-delivered payloads, Python-based loaders, and blockchain-backed dead-drop infrastructure, while the other relies on fileless execution, obfuscated PowerShell, and steganography-assisted in-memory payload delivery. This research highlights how operators of malware-as-a-service (MaaS) infostealers like ACR Stealer are using multiple intrusion chains to achieve the same objective. Read our blog for technical analysis, along with protection, detection, and hunting guidance.
posts.text_zh: Microsoft 對 ACR Stealer 活動增加的調查發現了兩種不同的入侵路徑，它們都從 ClickFix 開始，在執行上有所不同，但導致相同的結果：瀏覽器憑證、會話令牌和其他敏感資料的洩漏。 https://msft.it/6016v2sXq 一個攻擊鏈使用 WebDAV 交付的有效負載、基於 Python 的載入器和區塊鏈支援的死投基礎設施，而另一個攻擊鏈則依賴無檔案執行、混淆的 PowerShell 和隱寫術輔助的記憶體中有效負載交付。這項研究重點介紹了 ACR Stealer 等惡意軟體即服務 (MaaS) 資訊竊取者的營運商如何使用多個入侵鏈來實現相同的目標。請閱讀我們的博客，了解技術分析以及保育、檢測和狩獵指南。

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: Splunk has released security updates addressing multiple vulnerabilities in Splunk Enterprise and Splunk Cloud Platform. Find More: https://cybersecuritynews.com/multiple-splunk-enterprise-vulnerabilities-patched/ These flaws could lead to issues such as path traversal, disclosure of stored credential hashes, and arbitrary execution of SPL (Search Processing Language) searches. Three security vulnerabilities affecting both Splunk Enterprise and Splunk Cloud Platform have been patched. These issues impact the REST API and Splunk Web components, potentially allowing authorized users or phishing attackers to access sensitive data, write files to unintended directories, or execute arbitrary searches. #cybersecuritynews
posts.text_zh: Splunk 已發布安全性更新，解決 Splunk Enterprise 和 Splunk Cloud Platform 中的多個漏洞。了解更多：https://cybersecuritynews.com/multiple-splunk-enterprise-vulnerability-patched/ 這些缺陷可能會導致路徑遍歷、儲存的憑證雜湊洩漏以及任意執行 SPL（搜尋處理語言）搜尋等問題。影響 Splunk Enterprise 和 Splunk Cloud Platform 的三個安全漏洞已修復。這些問題會影響 REST API 和 Splunk Web 元件，可能允許授權使用者或網路釣魚攻擊者存取敏感資料、將檔案寫入非預期目錄或執行任意搜尋。 #網路安全新聞

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: ‼️ The Coca-Cola Company has filed form 8-K due to a cybersecurity incident on behalf of Fairlife, LLC. "On July 16, 2026, The Coca-Cola Company (the “Company”) announced that fairlife, LLC (“fairlife”), a dairy company owned by the Company, identified unauthorized access by a third party to a portion of its systems, including its production-related systems, in connection with a ransomware event. After detecting the issue, the Company promptly activated its incident response and business continuity protocols. The Company’s investigation and assessment of the impact of the incident is ongoing, with the assistance of outside advisors and cybersecurity experts. The Company has also notified law enforcement. Product quality and safety have not been impacted. However, as a result of the incident, production operations at fairlife in the United States are temporarily suspended. fairlife’s Canada production operations are not currently impacted. The Company is working diligently to complete the investigation and restore the systems and impacted operations. The full scope, nature and impacts of the incident are not yet known. Accordingly, the Company has not yet determined whether the incident is reasonably likely to materially affect the Company. The information in this Form 8-K shall not be deemed “filed” for purposes of Section 18 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, nor shall it be deemed incorporated by reference in any filing under the Securities Act of 1933, except as shall be expressly set forth by specific reference in such filing."
posts.text_zh: ️ 由於網路安全事件，可口可樂公司已代表 Fairlife, LLC 提交了 8-K 表格。 「2026 年 7 月 16 日，可口可樂公司（『公司』）宣布，該公司旗下的一家乳製品公司 fairlife, LLC（「fairlife」）發現第三方未經授權存取其部分系統，包括與勒索軟體事件有關的生產相關係統。該事件的影響進行調查和評估。年證券交易法》第 18 條而言，本表 8-K 中的信息不得被視為“已提交”，也不得被視為通過引用納入根據 1933 年《證券法》提交的任何文件中，除非在此類文件中通過具體引用明確規定。

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: ⚠️ Chainguard Images Deliver Near-Zero CVEs by Removing Unused Packages From Container Base Images. Traditional container base images ship with hundreds of unnecessary packages, each one a potential attack vector. @chainguard_dev's minimal, distroless images strip these out at build time, eliminating the vast majority of known vulnerabilities before code ever reaches production. In benchmark comparisons, Chainguard Images contain up to 95% fewer CVEs than standard alternatives like Ubuntu or Debian base images.
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ Chainguard 映像透過從容器基礎映像中刪除未使用的套件來提供接近零的 CVE。傳統的容器基礎鏡像附帶數百個不必要的包，每個包都是潛在的攻擊媒介。 @chainguard_dev 的最小的、無發行版的鏡像在構建時將這些漏洞剔除，從而在代碼投入生產之前消除了絕大多數已知的漏洞。在基準比較中，Chainguard 映像包含的 CVE 比 Ubuntu 或 Debian 基礎映像等標準替代方案少了 95%。

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: R to @The_Cyber_News: He also made clear that maintainers should assess contributions based on technical merit. In practice, that means an AI-assisted patch should still be expected to meet Linux kernel standards for correctness, maintainability, testing, and human review before it can be accepted. More Details: https://cybersecuritynews.com/linus-torvalds-linux-ai/
posts.text_zh: R 致@The_Cyber​​_News：他也明確表示維護者應根據技術優點評估貢獻。實際上，這意味著人工智慧輔助的補丁在被接受之前仍然應該滿足 Linux 核心的正確性、可維護性、測試和人工審查標準。更多詳細資訊：https://cybersecuritynews.com/linus-torvalds-linux-ai/

posts.name: The_Cyber_News
posts.text: Linux creator Linus Torvalds has told kernel developers that the Linux project is not anti-AI, arguing that artificial intelligence and large language models should be judged on whether they provide practical technical value. He emphasized that developers will not be forced to use AI tools, but opposition should not prevent others from using them responsibly. Torvalds made the remarks in a Linux kernel mailing-list discussion involving concerns over AI-assisted code review and the growing use of LLM-based tools by maintainers.
posts.text_zh: Linux創辦人Linus Torvalds告訴核心開發者，Linux專案並不是反AI的，他認為判斷人工智慧和大型語言模型應該根據它們是否提供實用的技術價值。他強調，開發者不會被迫使用人工智慧工具，但反對不應阻止其他人負責任地使用它們。 Torvalds 在 Linux 核心郵件清單討論中發表了上述言論，討論涉及對人工智慧輔助程式碼審查以及維護人員越來越多地使用基於 LLM 的工具的擔憂。
