posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: Regarding CVE-2026-56155, the in-the-wild ADFS vulnerability - the July patch just released does not fix the vulnerability. Instead it adds an audit log. The changes to harden the service and enforce protection will only apply with October 2026’s update applied. https:// support.microsoft.com/en-us/se rvicing/os/windows/docs/2026/07/kb5121391-cve-2026-56155-ad-fs-dkm-container-acl-hardening
posts.text_zh: 關於CVE-2026-56155，ADFS野外漏洞－剛發布的7月修補程式並沒有修復該漏洞。相反，它添加了審核日誌。強化服務和實施保護的變更僅適用於應用 2026 年 10 月的更新。 https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/se rvicing/os/windows/docs/2026/07/kb5121391-cve-2026-56155-ad-fs-dkm-container-acl-hardening

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 ShadowByt3$ Claims Breach of Sinar Mas Agribusiness, Exposes HR and Payroll Data A threat actor operating under the alias ShadowByt3$ claims to have breached Sinar Mas Agribusiness and Food (SMAF), a major subsidiary of the Indonesian conglomerate Sinar Mas Group. According to a post on an underground forum, the group alleges it gained access to the company’s workforce URL and is now exposing sensitive internal data after failing to receive a ransom payment. The actor alleges that the leak includes a wide range of sensitive employee data and corporate intellectual property. The post enumerates the following categories of exposed information: * **Government & Tax Identifiers:** Digital copies of Indonesian National ID Cards (KTP), Family Cards (KK), electronic tax cards (NPWP-Elektronik), salary declarations, and academic certificates. * **Corporate Payroll & Financial Logs:** Expense ledger spreadsheets, cash advance records, administrative transaction logs, and medical benefits forms for the Indonesian healthcare system (BPJS Kesehatan) and pension records. * **Talent Tracking & Strategy:** Executive talent cards for specific employees (Fitri Rahmiyani, Anton, and Ilyasa Deva Wirabuana), performance appraisals, and proprietary Balanced Scorecard alignment metrics. * **Internal HR Guides:** Internal toolkits for Performance Improvement Plans, exit checklists for various sectors (Refinery, Upstream, Corporate, Trading), and the 2023 SMAF Learning Catalogue. * **Workday Infrastructure:** Archives of Workday Knowledge bases, platform layout blueprints, corporate letterheads, and IT security procedures for handling locked user accounts. Sinar Mas Agribusiness and Food is one of the world’s largest producers of palm oil, supplying major global brands including Unilever, Nestlé, Procter & Gamble, Mondelēz International, and Johnson & Johnson. The threat actor claims that due to supply chain interdependencies, this breach also impacts these downstream partners, although no evidence of direct compromise at those companies was provided in the post. The data dump is reportedly hosted on MEGA, with mirrors on http://transfer.it and http://anonfilesnew.com, totaling 375.66MB. The actor states that the company was aware of the breach but failed to contact them, leading to the public exposure. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by security researchers or confirmed by Sinar Mas Group.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 ShadowByt3$ 聲稱入侵金光農業企業，暴露人力資源和薪資數據 一個化名 ShadowByt3$ 的威脅行為者聲稱入侵了印度尼西亞金光集團的主要子公司金光農業食品公司 (SMAF)。根據地下論壇上的一篇帖子，該組織聲稱它獲得了該公司員工 URL 的訪問權限，並且在未能收到贖金後正在暴露敏感的內部數據。該行為者聲稱，洩漏的內容包括廣泛的敏感員工資料和公司智慧財產權。該貼文列舉了以下幾類暴露的資訊：* **政府和稅務識別碼：** 印尼國民身分證（KTP）、家庭卡（KK）、電子稅卡（NPWP-Elektronik）、薪資申報單和學歷證書的數位副本。 * **公司薪資和財務日誌：** 費用分類帳電子表格、現金預支記錄、管理交易日誌以及印尼醫療保健系統 (BPJS Kesehatan) 的醫療福利表和退休金記錄。 * **人才追蹤與策略：** 針對特定員工（Fitri Rahmiyani、Anton 和 Ilyasa Deva Wirabuana）的高階主管人才卡、績效評估和專有的平衡計分卡調整指標。 * **內部人力資源指南：** 績效改進計劃的內部工具包、各個部門（煉油廠、上游、企業、貿易）的退出清單以及 2023 年 SMAF 學習目錄。 * **Workday 基礎架構：** Workday 知識庫檔案、平台佈局藍圖、公司信箋以及用於處理鎖定使用者帳戶的 IT 安全程序。金光農業食品公司是全球最大的棕櫚油生產商之一，為聯合利華、雀巢、寶潔、億滋國際和強生等全球主要品牌供貨。威脅行為者聲稱，由於供應鏈的相互依賴性，這種違規行為也會影響這些下游合作夥伴，儘管貼文中沒有提供這些公司直接受到損害的證據。據報道，資料轉儲託管在 MEGA 上，鏡像位於 http://transfer.it 和 http://anonfilesnew.com 上，總計 375.66MB。該演員表示，該公司知道這項違規行為，但沒有聯繫他們，導致公眾曝光。截至報告時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到安全研究人員的獨立核實或金光集團的確認。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Elon Musk Says X Will Become Fully Open Source Elon Musk announced that X plans to release its entire platform codebase as open source after completing a security review. * The release is intended to cover the entire X codebase. * Independent third-party reviewers will be invited to verify that the published code matches the production system. * No release date has been announced. * The plan remains subject to completion of the security review. Analyst Note: If implemented as described, this would be one of the largest open-source releases ever by a major social media platform. However, publishing source code does not necessarily mean releasing AI models, proprietary datasets, or other sensitive infrastructure components. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #OpenSource
posts.text_zh: 🚨 Elon Musk 表示 X 將完全開源 Elon Musk 宣布 X 計劃在完成安全審查後開源其整個平台程式碼庫。 * 此版本旨在覆蓋整個 X 程式碼庫。 * 將邀請獨立第三方評審員驗證發佈的代碼是否與生產系統相符。 * 尚未公佈發布日期。 * 本計劃仍需完成安全審查。分析師註釋：如果按照描述實施，這將是主要社交媒體平台有史以來最大的開源版本之一。然而，發布原始程式碼並不一定意味著發佈人工智慧模型、專有資料集或其他敏感基礎設施元件。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #OpenSource

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇦🇷 Argentine Government Credentials Allegedly Offered for Sale on Dark Web A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a bundle of active login credentials for 21 Argentine government platforms. According to the listing, the package allegedly includes verified access to multiple government portals spanning public administration, judicial services, taxation, municipal systems, and internal communications. The actor claims the credentials are active and ready for use, though no independent evidence has been provided to verify these assertions. Some of the referenced platforms include: * AFIP (Tax Authority) * PJN SSO (Judiciary) * DNRPA * RRHH GBA * Municipalidad de Neuquén * Webmail services * Additional provincial and municipal government portals At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from Argentine authorities that these credentials are genuine or that any of the listed systems have been compromised. * Country: Argentina 🇦🇷 * Alleged targets: 21 government platforms * Alleged access: Active government login credentials * Status: Unverified claim Analyst Note: If authentic, access to legitimate government accounts poses a significantly higher risk than leaked databases, potentially enabling unauthorized access to sensitive information, internal communications, and administrative systems. Organizations should immediately review authentication logs, reset affected credentials, and enforce phishing-resistant MFA where possible. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Argentina
posts.text_zh: 🇦🇷 據稱在暗網上出售阿根廷政府憑證 一名威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱的 21 個阿根廷政府平台的一組活躍登錄憑證。根據清單，據稱該軟體包包括經過驗證的多個政府入口網站的存取權限，涵蓋公共管理、司法服務、稅務、市政系統和內部通訊。攻擊者聲稱這些憑證已啟動並可供使用，但尚未提供獨立證據來驗證這些說法。一些參考平台包括： * AFIP（稅務機關） * PJN SSO（司法機構） * DNRPA * RRHH GBA * 內烏肯市政府 * 網路郵件服務 * 其他省和市政府入口網站 截至撰寫本文時，阿根廷當局尚未公開確認這些憑證的真實性或列出的任何系統已受到損害。 * 國家：阿根廷 🇦🇷 * 涉嫌目標：21 個政府平台 * 涉嫌存取：有效的政府登入憑證 * 狀態：未經驗證的聲明 分析師註釋：如果屬實，存取合法政府帳戶的風險明顯高於洩漏的資料庫，可能導致未經授權的存取敏感資訊、內部通訊和管理系統。組織應立即檢查身份驗證日誌，重置受影響的憑證，並在可能的情況下強制實施防網路釣魚的 MFA。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Argentina

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇨🇦 Alleged Goodszilla Customer Database Advertised on Dark Web A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a customer database belonging to http://Goodszilla.ca, a Toronto-based fintech company that provides embedded charitable donation solutions for retailers. According to the forum post, the alleged dataset contains approximately 114,000 records. A sample shared by the actor suggests the data may include names, email addresses, provinces, and countries. However, there is currently insufficient evidence to independently verify the authenticity, origin, or completeness of the claimed dataset. At the time of writing, Goodszilla has not publicly confirmed any security incident related to these claims. * Target: http://Goodszilla.ca * Country: Canada 🇨🇦 * Alleged records: ~114,000 * Alleged exposed data: * Names * Email addresses * Province * Country * Status: Unverified claim Analyst Note: Even limited customer datasets can be leveraged for phishing, business email compromise, and social engineering campaigns. Organizations should investigate such claims promptly, while customers should remain cautious of unsolicited emails referencing their accounts or donations. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Canada
posts.text_zh: 🇨🇦 涉嫌在暗網上宣傳的 Goodszilla 客戶資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於 http://Goodszilla.ca 的客戶資料庫，這是一家總部位於多倫多的金融科技公司，為零售商提供嵌入式慈善捐贈解決方案。根據論壇帖子，所謂的資料集包含大約 114,000 條記錄。該行為者共享的樣本表明，數據可能包括姓名、電子郵件地址、省份和國家。然而，目前沒有足夠的證據來獨立驗證所聲稱的資料集的真實性、來源或完整性。截至撰寫本文時，Goodszilla 尚未公開證實與這些說法相關的任何安全事件。 * 目標：http://Goodszilla.ca * 國家：加拿大 🇨🇦 * 涉嫌記錄：~114,000 * 涉嫌暴露的資料： * 姓名 * 電子郵件地址 * 省份 * 國家 * 狀態：未經驗證的聲明 分析師注意：即使有限的客戶資料集也可用於網路釣魚、商業電子郵件洩露和社會工程活動。組織應立即調查此類索賠，而客戶應對提及其帳戶或捐贈的未經請求的電子郵件保持警惕。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Canada

posts.text: 🇳🇱 Alleged http://welhof.com Customer Database Advertised on Dark Web A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a customer database belonging to http://welhof.com on a dark web marketplace. Based on the listing, the alleged dataset includes customer and order information such as email addresses, billing and shipping names, physical addresses, order values, and purchase status. A sample of the purported data was shared, but there is currently insufficient evidence to independently verify the authenticity or origin of the dataset. At the time of writing, http://welhof.com has not publicly acknowledged any security incident related to these claims. * Target: http://welhof.com * Country: Netherlands 🇳🇱 * Alleged exposed data: * Customer email addresses * Billing and shipping names * Billing and shipping addresses * Order details and purchase values * Order status * Status: Unverified claim Analyst Note: E-commerce databases are frequently leveraged for phishing, account takeover attempts, and payment fraud. Organizations should investigate any claims of compromise promptly, while customers should remain vigilant for phishing emails and use unique passwords protected by MFA where available. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Netherlands
posts.text_zh: 🇳🇱 涉嫌在暗網上宣傳 http://welhof.com 客戶資料庫 威脅行為者正在暗網市場上宣傳他們聲稱屬於 http://welhof.com 的客戶資料庫。根據清單，涉嫌的資料集包括客戶和訂單訊息，例如電子郵件地址、帳單和送貨名稱、實際地址、訂單價值和購買狀態。所稱數據的樣本已被共享，但目前沒有足夠的證據來獨立驗證數據集的真實性或來源。截至撰寫本文時，http://welhof.com 尚未公開承認與這些聲明相關的任何安全事件。 * 目標：http://welhof.com * 國家：荷蘭 🇳🇱 * 涉嫌暴露的資料： * 客戶電子郵件地址 * 帳單和送貨名稱 * 帳單和送貨地址 * 訂單詳細資訊和購買價值 * 訂單狀態 * 狀態：未經驗證的索賠 分析師註：電子商務資料庫經常被用於詐騙、接管帳戶帳戶經常被用於詐騙。組織應立即調查任何洩露的指控，而客戶應對網路釣魚電子郵件保持警惕，並在可用時使用受 MFA 保護的唯一密碼。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Netherlands

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Promotes "DarkMatter" Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) Affiliate Program A threat actor announced the launch of a Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) affiliate program named DarkMatter, targeting small, medium, and large enterprises. According to the post, the group states that it does not permit attacks against organizations located in the CIS region or the healthcare sector, while promoting long-term partnerships and operational support for affiliates. According to the advertisement, the threat actor provides affiliates with customized ransomware builds, dedicated Tor-based management panels, real-time callback reporting, encrypted communications, and ongoing operational support. The offering also supports multiple payload formats, including executable files, DLLs, PowerShell scripts, batch files, and memory-only (fileless) payloads, allowing affiliates to tailor deployments to different attack scenarios. The advertised ransomware is claimed to support a wide range of capabilities, including: - Configurable file encryption and deployment options - Active Directory integration and domain-wide propagation - Network spreading through SMB, PsExec, and Group Policy - Credential dumping and privilege impersonation - Defense evasion and anti-analysis techniques - Anti-debugging, anti-VM, and sandbox detection - Backup and shadow copy deletion - ESXi virtualization environment targeting - Tor-based victim portals for ransom negotiations #RaaS #ThreatIntelligence #DarkWeb
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者推廣「DarkMatter」勒索軟體即服務 (RaaS) 附屬計劃 威脅行為者宣布推出名為 DarkMatter 的勒索軟體即服務 (RaaS) 附屬計劃，針對小型、中型和大型企業。該貼文稱，該組織聲明不允許對位於獨聯體地區或醫療保健行業的組織進行攻擊，同時促進對附屬機構的長期合作夥伴關係和營運支援。根據廣告，威脅行為者為附屬機構提供客製化的勒索軟體版本、基於 Tor 的專用管理面板、即時回調報告、加密通訊和持續的營運支援。該產品還支援多種有效負載格式，包括可執行檔、DLL、PowerShell 腳本、批次檔和僅記憶體（無檔案）有效負載，允許分公司根據不同的攻擊場景自訂部署。宣傳的勒索軟體據稱支援多種功能，包括： - 可設定的檔案加密和部署選項 - Active Directory 整合和網域範圍傳播 - 透過 SMB、PsExec 和群組原則進行網路傳播 - 憑證轉儲和特權模擬 - 防禦規避和反分析技術 - 反偵錯、反虛擬機和沙匣偵測 - 備份和磁碟區副本版面複製和反分析技術 - 反偵錯、反虛擬機和沙匣偵測 - 備份和磁碟區複製版面紙 - ESXi 環境複製#ThreatIntelligence #DarkWeb

posts.text: 🇮🇶 Iraqi Citizen Databases Advertised for Sale on Dark Web A threat actor is advertising what they claim are up-to-date Iraqi databases for sale on a dark web forum. The listing references several Iraqi organizations and services, including QiCard, Zain Iraq, and what appears to be Iraq's General Directorate of Traffic, suggesting access to multiple datasets. However, the post does not specify the volume of records or provide sufficient evidence to independently verify the authenticity, scope, or origin of the alleged data. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from the referenced organizations regarding these claims. * Country: Iraq 🇮🇶 * Alleged targets: QiCard, Zain Iraq, Iraqi government-related databases * Status: Unverified sale advertisement Analyst Note: Threat actors frequently advertise national identity and telecommunications datasets due to their high value for identity fraud, SIM-swap attacks, financial fraud, and social engineering. Organizations and authorities should investigate such claims to determine their validity and potential impact. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Iraq
posts.text_zh: 🇮🇶 伊拉克公民資料庫在暗網上宣傳出售 一名威脅行為者正在暗網論壇上宣傳他們聲稱出售的最新伊拉克資料庫。該清單引用了多個伊拉克組織和服務，包括 QiCard、Zain伊拉克和似乎是伊拉克交通總局，建議存取多個資料集。然而，該貼文沒有具體說明記錄的數量，也沒有提供足夠的證據來獨立驗證所指控數據的真實性、範圍或來源。截至撰寫本文時，所提及的組織尚未對這些說法進行公開確認。 * 國家：伊拉克 🇮🇶 * 涉嫌目標：QiCard、Zain伊拉克、伊拉克政府相關資料庫 * 狀態：未經驗證的銷售廣告 分析師註釋：威脅行為者經常宣傳國家身分和電信資料集，因為它們在身分詐欺、SIM卡交換攻擊、金融詐欺和社會工程方面具有很高的價值。組織和當局應調查此類主張，以確定其有效性和潛在影響。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Iraq

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇩🇪 Alleged German Database Advertised on Dark Web A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to http://bservice.de, a Germany-based organization. The forum post suggests the database is being shared publicly and includes email addresses, with a sample of the alleged dataset provided. However, the post does not disclose the total number of affected records or provide sufficient evidence to independently verify the authenticity or origin of the data. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from http://bservice.de regarding the alleged incident, and the claims remain unverified. * Target: http://bservice.de * Country: Germany 🇩🇪 * Alleged exposed data: Email addresses * Status: Unverified claim Analyst Note: Organizations should treat newly advertised datasets as potential indicators of compromise and investigate promptly. Users should be cautious of phishing emails and ensure passwords are unique and protected with MFA. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany
posts.text_zh: 🇩🇪 暗網上公佈的所謂德國資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於德國組織 http://bservice.de 的資料庫。論壇貼文表明該資料庫正在公開分享，其中包括電子郵件地址，並提供了所謂資料集的樣本。然而，該貼文並未透露受影響記錄的總數，也沒有提供足夠的證據來獨立驗證數據的真實性或來源。截至撰寫本文時，http://bservice.de 尚未對所指控的事件進行公開確認，並且這些說法仍未得到證實。 * 目標：http://bservice.de * 國家：德國 🇩🇪 * 據稱暴露的資料：電子郵件地址 * 狀態：未經驗證的聲明 分析師注意：組織應將新公佈的資料集視為潛在的妥協指標，並立即進行調查。使用者應警惕網路釣魚電子郵件，並確保密碼是唯一的並受 MFA 保護。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Threat actor uses Gemini CLI to operate a botnet and access a healthcare database Trend Micro documented a Russian-speaking actor known as “bandcampro” using Google’s Gemini CLI to help manage command-and-control infrastructure, troubleshoot infections and operate a small botnet. Researchers observed the actor gain access to systems at a dental clinic and the OpenDental database; the AI tool reportedly assisted with migration of the botnet infrastructure and retained credentials encountered during the sessions. #DDW #Intelligence #TrendMicro #AISecurity
posts.text_zh: 威脅行為者使用 Gemini CLI 來操作殭屍網路並存取醫療保健資料庫趨勢科技記錄了一個名為「bandcampro」的俄語行為者使用 Google 的 Gemini CLI 來幫助管理命令和控制基礎設施、解決感染問題並操作小型殭屍網路。研究人員觀察到該行為者可以存取牙科診所的系統和 OpenDental 資料庫；據報道，該人工智慧工具協助殭屍網路基礎設施的遷移，並保留會議期間遇到的憑證。 #DDW #Intelligence #TrendMicro #AISecurity

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇪🇺 Alleged NEBBIA Fitness Customer Database Advertised on Dark Web A threat actor has claimed to have breached NEBBIA, a European fitness apparel brand, and is advertising what they describe as a database containing information on more than 32,000 customers. According to the forum post, the dataset allegedly contains customer information associated with European users. The actor has not publicly provided sufficient evidence to independently verify the authenticity or origin of the claimed data. At the time of writing, there is no independent confirmation that NEBBIA has experienced a data breach, and the claims remain unverified. Analyst Note: Even relatively small customer databases can be valuable to threat actors for credential stuffing, phishing campaigns, and identity-based fraud. Organizations should investigate such claims promptly, while customers should remain alert for suspicious emails and reuse of credentials. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Europe
posts.text_zh: 🇪🇺 據稱在暗網上宣傳的 NEBBIA 健身客戶資料庫 一名威脅行為者聲稱已入侵歐洲健身服裝品牌 NEBBIA，並正在宣傳他們所描述的包含 32,000 多名客戶資訊的資料庫。根據論壇帖子，據稱該資料集包含與歐洲用戶相關的客戶資訊。該行為者尚未公開提供足夠的證據來獨立驗證所聲稱資料的真實性或來源。截至本文撰寫時，尚無獨立證實 NEBBIA 經歷過資料洩露，且相關說法仍未得到證實。分析師註釋：即使相對較小的客戶資料庫對於撞庫、網路釣魚活動和基於身分的詐欺的威脅行為者也可能很有價值。組織應立即調查此類索賠，而客戶應對可疑電子郵件和重複使用憑證保持警惕。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Europe

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged http://Seeking.com Database Advertised for Sale A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to http://Seeking.com, alleging it contains approximately 56 million user records. According to the forum post, the sample data allegedly includes: * Email addresses * Password hashes * Names and profile details * Gender and birthdates * Location and language information * Relationship preferences and interests * Education and occupation data * Income and net worth fields * Body type, ethnicity, height, smoking and drinking preferences * Account status, membership tier, verification status, registration dates, and last activity * Registration IP addresses At the time of writing, there is no independent evidence confirming that http://Seeking.com has been compromised or that the advertised dataset is authentic. The actor's claims should be treated as unverified until confirmed by the affected organization or through independent analysis. Analyst Note: If authentic, the exposure of a dating platform dataset could present significant privacy and extortion risks due to the sensitivity of user profile information. Organizations and users should avoid assuming authenticity until verified, while remaining vigilant for phishing and credential reuse attacks. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Dating
posts.text_zh: 🚨 涉嫌廣告出售 http://Seeking.com 資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於 http://Seeking.com 的資料庫，聲稱該資料庫包含大約 5600 萬筆使用者記錄。根據論壇帖子，樣本資料據稱包括： * 電子郵件地址 * 密碼哈希 * 姓名和個人資料詳細資訊 * 性別和出生日期 * 位置和語言資訊 * 關係偏好和興趣 * 教育和職業資料 * 收入和淨資產欄位 * 體型、種族、身高、吸煙和飲酒偏好 * 帳戶狀態、會員等級、驗證狀態、註冊日期和最後活動 註冊日期和最後一個活動 1.com已洩露或廣告中的內容資料集是真實的。在受到受影響組織或透過獨立分析確認之前，行為者的主張應被視為未經驗證。分析師註釋：如果真實，由於用戶個人資料資訊的敏感性，約會平台資料集的暴露可能會帶來重大的隱私和勒索風險。組織和使用者應避免在驗證之前假設真實性，同時對網路釣魚和憑證重用攻擊保持警惕。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Dating

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇩🇪 Alleged German Agricultural Equipment Database Advertised on Hacking Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database associated with http://sommer-landmaschinen.de, a Germany-based agricultural machinery retailer. According to the forum post: * The database is being shared for free. * Sample records appear to contain WordPress user information. * The sample includes usernames, email addresses, display names, account metadata, registration dates, and activation fields. * The actor provides sample database entries to support the claim. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that http://sommer-landmaschinen.de has been compromised or that the advertised database is authentic. Analyst Note: If legitimate, the exposure of a WordPress user database could enable phishing, credential stuffing, and account takeover attempts, particularly if passwords or password hashes are included and users have reused credentials across multiple services. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany
posts.text_zh: 🇩🇪 駭客論壇上刊登的所謂德國農業設備資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱與德國農業機械零售商 http://sommer-landmaschinen.de 相關的資料庫。根據論壇貼文： * 該資料庫正在免費分享。 * 範例記錄似乎包含 WordPress 使用者資訊。 * 範例包括使用者名稱、電子郵件地址、顯示名稱、帳戶元資料、註冊日期和啟動欄位。 * 參與者提供了範例資料庫條目來支援該聲明。截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立證據表明 http://sommer-landmaschinen.de 已洩露或所宣傳的資料庫是真實的。分析師註釋：如果合法，WordPress 使用者資料庫的暴露可能會導致網路釣魚、憑證填充和帳戶接管嘗試，特別是在包含密碼或密碼雜湊並且使用者在多個服務中重複使用憑證的情況下。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 Threat Actor Claims Breach of http://EVA.gg, Releases Alleged User Database A threat actor claims to have breached http://EVA.gg, a France-based immersive VR esports platform, and is advertising what they describe as the complete database for free. According to the post, the actor claims: * Approximately 70,400 user accounts with profile information * Around 119,000 booking and reservation records * User profile data including email addresses, physical addresses, and Battle Pass information * Information on 63 locations across France * Data related to 99 vendors, 764 products, and 10 games * Native CSV exports, revenue-by-location data, and other internal business information The threat actor alleges the data was obtained by reconstructing a GraphQL schema from the platform's administrative dashboard and testing production endpoints after introspection was disabled. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that http://EVA.gg has been compromised or that the advertised dataset is authentic. Analyst Note: If confirmed, the exposure would affect both customer and operational data. In addition to user privacy risks, disclosure of internal business information could provide valuable intelligence for future cyberattacks, fraud, or competitive abuse. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 威脅行為者聲稱破壞了 http://EVA.gg，並發布了所謂的用戶資料庫 威脅行為者聲稱已經破壞了位於法國的沉浸式 VR 電競平台 http://EVA.gg，並免費宣傳他們所描述的完整資料庫。根據該帖子，該攻擊者聲稱： * 大約 70,400 個包含個人資料資訊的用戶帳戶 * 約 119,000 條預訂和預訂記錄 * 用戶個人資料數據，包括電子郵件地址、實際地址和 Battle Pass 資訊 * 有關法國 63 個地點的資訊 * 與 99 個供應商、764 個產品和 10 個遊戲資料威脅攻擊者聲稱這些資料是透過重建 GraphQL 模式獲得的從平台的管理儀表板並在禁用內省後測試生產端點。截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立驗證證明 http://EVA.gg 已洩露或所宣傳的資料集是否真實。分析師註：如果得到證實，該風險將影響客戶和營運數據。除了用戶隱私風險之外，內部業務資訊的揭露還可以為未來的網路攻擊、詐欺或競爭濫用提供有價值的情報。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: threatintel
posts.text: #ThreatProtection Fake GitHub repos are impersonating legitimate vendors to deliver a BoryptGrab-lineage infostealer. Read more about Symantec's protection: https://www.broadcom.com/support/security-center/protection-bulletin/daxin-returns-stealthy-malware-resurfaces-in-taiwan-alongside-a-new-backdoor
posts.text_zh: #ThreatProtection 假 GitHub 儲存庫冒充合法供應商來提供 BoryptGrab 譜系資訊竊取程式。了解更多關於賽門鐵克防護的資訊：https://www.broadcom.com/support/security-center/protection-bulletin/daxin-returns-stealthy-malware-resurfaces-in-taiwan-alongside-a-new-backdoor

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇪🇨 Threat Actor Claims Breach of Ecuadorian Mobility Platform Clipp A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a full compromise of Clipp (http://clipp.app / http://kradac.com), an Ecuador-based mobility and digital transportation platform operating across several Latin American countries. According to the post, the actor claims to possess: * Approximately 19 GB of stolen data * More than 100 databases * Around 5 million records * Customer usernames and passwords * Proprietary source code * Internal documents and PDF/TXT files * Access to development services and cloud management consoles * Payment-related information * Persistent access to the environment via a reverse shell The post also includes screenshots that allegedly demonstrate access to internal administrative systems. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that Clipp or http://kradac.com has been compromised or that the advertised data is authentic. Analyst Note: If substantiated, the combination of customer data, source code, cloud infrastructure access, and persistent remote access would represent a severe breach with the potential to impact both customer information and the organization's software supply chain. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Ecuador
posts.text_zh: 🇪🇨 威脅行為者聲稱破壞了厄瓜多爾行動平台 Clipp 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱完全入侵 Clipp (http://clipp.app / http://kradac.com) 的內容，這是一個在多個拉丁美洲國家運營的厄瓜多爾行動和數位交通平台。根據該帖子，該攻擊者聲稱擁有： * 大約 19 GB 的被盜數據 * 超過 100 個資料庫 * 大約 500 萬條記錄 * 客戶用戶名和密碼 * 專有源代碼 * 內部文檔和 PDF/TXT 文件 * 訪問開發服務和雲管理控制台 * 支付相關信息 * 通過 shell 屏幕訪問 shell 權限對環境的持久性的持久訪問系統顯示系統顯示的信息截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立證據表明 Clipp 或 http://kradac.com 已洩露或廣告資料的真實性。分析師註釋：如果得到證實，客戶資料、原始程式碼、雲端基礎設施存取和持久遠端存取的組合將構成嚴重違規，有可能影響客戶資訊和組織的軟體供應鏈。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Ecuador

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇩🇪 Alleged WordPress Database for German Automotive Platform Advertised A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a WordPress database associated with http://motoport-haendler.de, a Germany-based motorcycle dealer platform. According to the forum post: * A WordPress database is being offered for download. * Sample records appear to include user IDs, usernames, email addresses, first and last names, IP addresses, account status, and related metadata. * The actor provides sample database entries to support the claim. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that the database is authentic or that http://motoport-haendler.de has been compromised. Analyst Note: If legitimate, the exposure of a WordPress user database could facilitate phishing, credential stuffing attacks, and account takeover attempts, particularly where passwords have been reused across multiple services. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany
posts.text_zh: 🇩🇪 宣傳德國汽車平台的 WordPress 資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱與德國摩托車經銷商平台 http://motoport-haendler.de 相關的 WordPress 資料庫。根據論壇貼文： * WordPress 資料庫可供下載。 * 範例記錄似乎包括使用者 ID、使用者名稱、電子郵件地址、名字和姓氏、IP 位址、帳戶狀態和相關元資料。 * 參與者提供了範例資料庫條目來支援該聲明。截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立驗證資料庫的真實性或 http://motoport-haendler.de 已洩露。分析師註釋：如果合法，WordPress 使用者資料庫的暴露可能會促進網路釣魚、撞庫攻擊和帳戶接管嘗試，特別是在多個服務中重複使用密碼的情況下。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 French Social Centers Federation Platform Allegedly Compromised A threat actor claims to have compromised Rezofed, the internal IT platform of the Fédération des Centres Sociaux et Socioculturels de France (FCSF), and is threatening to release source code, databases, and configuration files. According to the post, the actor claims: * The compromise affected Rezofed (http://rezofed.centres-sociaux.fr) * An Apache webshell was allegedly used to gain access * 29 database tables were exported to CSV * The attacker claims to have obtained full read/write access to the platform * Source code, databases, and configuration files were allegedly exfiltrated * The actor also claims to have deleted data from the server and is demanding the organization make contact At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that the claims are authentic or that the platform has been compromised. Analyst Note: If confirmed, a compromise of an internal platform with administrative privileges could expose sensitive organizational data, disrupt operations, and require credential rotation, forensic investigation, and integrity validation across affected systems. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 法國社會中心聯合會平台據稱遭到入侵 一名威脅行為者聲稱已經入侵了法國社會文化中心聯合會 (FCSF) 的內部 IT 平台 Rezofed，並威脅要發布源代碼、數據庫和配置文件。根據該帖子，該攻擊者聲稱： * 受影響的 Rezofed (http://rezofed.centres-sociaux.fr) * 據稱使用 Apache Webshell 來獲取訪問權限 * 29 個資料庫表被導出為 CSV * 攻擊者聲稱已獲得對該平台的完全讀取/寫入訪問權限 * 源代碼、資料庫和配置文件已被報告截至撰寫本文時，沒有獨立的驗證表明聲明是真實的或平台已被破壞。分析師註釋：如果得到證實，具有管理權限的內部平台受到損害可能會暴露敏感的組織資料、擾亂運營，並需要在受影響的系統中進行憑證輪調、取證調查和完整性驗證。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Alleged TotalEnergies Customer Database Leak on Darkweb Forum A post on the Darkforums underground community claims to offer a database containing personal and account details of 20 million TotalEnergies customers for sale. The actor, operating under the handle @MrL33tH4, alleges that the dataset includes full information for residential clients in France. According to the listing, the database is priced at 650 euros. The seller provides a sample of the data structure, which reportedly contains the following fields: * Civilité (Title) * Nom (Last Name) * Prénom (First Name) * Téléphone (Phone Number) * Identifiant du point (Point Identifier) * fournisseur (Supplier) * Catégorie client (Client Category) * adresse (Address) * Code postal (Postal Code) * Commune (City/Municipality) * Formule tarifaire (Tariff Formula) * Calendrier Fournisseur (Supplier Calendar) * Puissance souscrite demandée (Subscribed Power Requested) * country The sample entries shown in the thread display French residential addresses, phone numbers, and specific energy consumption details, such as "Tarif BT <= 36kVA" and subscribed power levels like "6 kVA" or "9 kVA". The actor claims the source website is http://totalenergies.fr. TotalEnergies is a major multinational energy company headquartered in France, serving millions of customers globally. If authentic, the exposure of such detailed customer records including names, addresses, and phone numbers could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns, social engineering attacks, or identity theft against French residents. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by TotalEnergies or security researchers.
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ Darkweb 論壇上涉嫌 TotalEnergies 客戶資料庫洩露 Darkforums 地下社群上的一篇貼文聲稱提供一個包含 2000 萬 TotalEnergies 客戶個人和帳戶詳細資訊的資料庫可供出售。該攻擊者以 @MrL33tH4 為名進行操作，聲稱該資料集包含法國住宅客戶的完整資訊。根據清單，該資料庫售價為650歐元。賣家提供了資料結構樣本，據報導其中包含以下欄位： * Civilité（頭銜） * Nom（姓氏） * Prénom（名字） * Téléphone（電話號碼） * Identifiant du point（點識別碼） * fournisseur（供應商） * Catégorie client（客戶類別） Formula tarifaire（關稅公式）* Calendrier Fournisseur（供應商日曆）* Puissance souscritedemandée（請求的訂閱功率）*國家/地區線程中顯示的示例條目顯示法國住宅地址、電話號碼和特定能源消耗詳細信息，例如“Tarif BT <= 36kVA”和訂閱功率級別，例如“96 kVA”。該演員聲稱來源網站是 http://totalenergies.fr。 TotalEnergies 是一家總部位於法國的大型跨國能源公司，為全球數百萬客戶提供服務。如果真實，暴露此類詳細的客戶記錄（包括姓名、地址和電話號碼）可能會促進針對法國居民的有針對性的網路釣魚活動、社會工程攻擊或身分盜竊。截至本報告發布之時，TotalEnergies 或安全研究人員尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Breach of Abbott Through Third-Party Lab Portal A threat actor calling itself "ShadowByt3S" claims to have compromised Abbott through a LabCentral portal and is threatening to publish allegedly stolen data unless the company responds within 48 hours. According to the post, the actor claims to have exfiltrated approximately 690 MB of data, including: * CE certificates and manufacturing compliance documents * Laboratory automation operation manuals * Technical specifications and product documentation * Regulatory and reference materials * Standard operating procedures (SOPs) and troubleshooting guides * Product requirement documentation reportedly obtained via API access The threat actor also claims to possess supporting evidence, including emails, screenshots, and file listings. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that Abbott or the referenced third-party portal was compromised. Analyst Note: While the claimed dataset appears to consist primarily of technical and regulatory documentation rather than customer information, unauthorized access to internal product documentation and operational materials could present intellectual property, supply chain, and security risks if the claims are substantiated. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Healthcare
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱透過第三方實驗室入口網站破壞了 Abbott 一名自稱「ShadowByt3S」的威脅行為者聲稱透過 LabCentral 入口網站危害了 Abbott，並威脅要發布涉嫌被盜的數據，除非該公司在 48 小時內做出回應。根據該帖子，該攻擊者聲稱已洩露了約 690 MB 的數據，包括： * CE 證書和製造合規文件 * 實驗室自動化操作手冊 * 技術規格和產品文檔 * 監管和參考材料 * 標準操作程序 (SOP) 和故障排除指南 * 據報道通過 API 訪問獲得的產品要求文檔列表威脅攻擊者還聲稱擁有屏幕支持證據。截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立證據表明 Abbott 或引用的第三方入口網站已受到損害。分析師註釋：雖然所聲稱的數據集似乎主要由技術和監管文件組成，而不是客戶信息，但如果索賠得到證實，未經授權訪問內部產品文檔和操作材料可能會帶來知識產權、供應鍊和安全風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Healthcare

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 40,000 Askari Bank Records Leaked on Darkweb A darkweb forum post claims that a database containing approximately 40,000 records from Askari Bank, one of Pakistan’s largest financial institutions, has been compromised and is available for sale. The actor alleges that the leak includes sensitive customer data such as national identification numbers (CNIC), full names, residential addresses, account numbers, and contact details. According to the listing, the exposed data fields include: * Bank name and branch name * CNIC / National ID * Customer Name * Address * Account number * Contact Number * Account Type (e.g., Saving A/C, Current A/C) The post provides sample entries showing customers from branches in Rawalpindi and Karachi, including specific street addresses and phone numbers. Askari Bank is a major player in Pakistan’s banking sector, with a significant retail and corporate customer base. If authentic, the exposure of CNICs alongside account numbers could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns, identity theft, and social engineering attacks against the bank's customers. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Askari Bank or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱 40,000 條阿斯卡里銀行記錄在暗網上洩露 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱，包含巴基斯坦最大金融機構之一阿斯卡里銀行約 40,000 條記錄的數據庫已被洩露並可供出售。該行為者聲稱，洩露的內容包括敏感的客戶數據，例如國民身分證號碼 (CNIC)、全名、​​居住地址、帳號和聯絡資訊。根據清單，暴露的資料欄位包括： * 銀行名稱和分行名稱 * CNIC / 國民身分證 * 客戶姓名 * 地址 * 帳號 * 聯絡電話 * 帳戶類型（例如，儲蓄帳戶、目前帳戶） 該貼文提供了顯示來自拉瓦爾品第和卡拉奇分行的客戶的樣本條目，包括具體的街道地址和電話號碼。阿斯卡里銀行是巴基斯坦銀行業的主要參與者，擁有龐大的零售和企業客戶群。如果真實，CNIC 與帳號一起暴露可能會促進針對銀行客戶的有針對性的網路釣魚活動、身分盜竊和社會工程攻擊。截至本報告發布之時，Askari Bank 或第三方安全研究人員尚未對涉嫌違規行為進行獨立核實。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Dutch authorities dismantle alleged €100-million-per-month investment fraud operation Dutch police announced arrests connected to an international investment-fraud organization allegedly operating approximately 20 call centers with more than 700 fake financial advisers. Authorities estimate the organization may at one point have generated over €100 million per month, targeting tens of thousands of victims through fraudulent investment platforms and cryptocurrency payments. #DDW #Intelligence #TheNetherlands
posts.text_zh: 荷蘭當局搗毀涉嫌每月 1 億歐元的投資詐欺行動 荷蘭警方宣布逮捕與一個國際投資詐欺組織有關的人，該組織涉嫌經營約 20 個呼叫中心，並擁有 700 多名假財務顧問。當局估計該組織每月可能獲利超過 1 億歐元，透過欺詐性投資平台和加密貨幣支付瞄準數萬名受害者。 #DDW #Intelligence #TheNetherlands

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇹🇭 Alleged Backup & Configuration Archive for 1,500+ Thai Government and School Websites Advertised A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a large archive containing backups and configuration files associated with http://thai.ac, a platform used by schools, municipalities, and local government organizations in Thailand. According to the post, the archive allegedly contains: * 907 MB of SQL databases, configuration files, and backups * Data related to 1,500+ websites * Names, phone numbers, email addresses, physical addresses, and password hashes * Website configuration files and database credentials * Claimed write access capable of modifying or defacing 1,500+ connected websites At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified. Analyst Note: If authentic, this would represent a significant supply chain-style compromise. Access to shared configuration files and administrative credentials could enable widespread website defacement, credential theft, lateral movement, and unauthorized access across numerous educational and local government portals. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Thailand
posts.text_zh: 🇹🇭 涉嫌宣傳 1,500 多個泰國政府和學校網站的備份和配置存檔 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱的大型檔案，其中包含與 http://thai.ac 相關的備份和配置文件，http://thai.ac 是泰國學校、市政府和地方政府組織使用的平台。根據該帖子，該檔案據稱包含： * 907 MB 的 SQL 資料庫、設定檔和備份 * 與 1,500 多個網站相關的資料 * 姓名、電話號碼、電子郵件地址、實體地址和密碼雜湊 * 網站設定檔和資料庫憑證 * 聲稱能夠修改或破壞 1,500 多個連接網站的寫入聲明 截至撰寫本文時，這些聲明授權尚未得到獨立驗證。分析師註：如果屬實，這將代表著重大的供應鍊式妥協。對共享個人資料和管理憑證的存取可能會導致廣泛的網站篡改、憑證盜竊、橫向移動以及跨眾多教育和地方政府門戶的未經授權的存取。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Thailand

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇩🇪 Alleged German Database Advertised on Hacking Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database associated with http://rangee.com, a Germany-based IT and digital workplace solutions provider. According to the forum post: * The database is being offered for download. * Sample data appears to contain numerous email addresses associated with German organizations. * The actor claims email data is included, although the total number of records and full dataset contents were not disclosed. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that the database is authentic or that http://rangee.com was compromised. Analyst Note: Even limited corporate email datasets can be leveraged for phishing, credential stuffing, business email compromise (BEC), and targeted social engineering campaigns if the claims prove to be legitimate. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany
posts.text_zh: 🇩🇪 駭客論壇上宣傳的所謂德國資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱與 http://rangee.com（一家位於德國的 IT 和數位工作場所解決方案提供商）相關的資料庫。根據論壇貼文： * 資料庫可供下載。 * 範例資料似乎包含許多與德國組織相關的電子郵件地址。 * 攻擊者聲稱其中包含電子郵件數據，但未透露記錄總數和完整數據集內容。截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立驗證資料庫的真實性或 http://rangee.com 已洩露。分析師註釋：如果聲明被證明是合法的，即使有限的企業電子郵件資料集也可以用於網路釣魚、撞庫、商業電子郵件外洩 (BEC) 和有針對性的社會工程活動。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: Group-IB Threat Intelligence has already identified 100+ ClickLock Stealer victims across 33 countries since May 2026, proving that macOS threats are evolving beyond rare, sophisticated attacks. The malware uses compromised WordPress infrastructure for payload delivery and self-deletes after execution, leaving minimal forensic traces. Read Group-IB's full technical breakdown here: https://link.group-ib.com/4gC4lHJ
posts.text_zh: R 致@GroupIB_TI：自 2026 年 5 月以來，Group-IB 威脅情報已在 33 個國家/地區識別出 100 多個 ClickLock Stealer 受害者，證明 macOS 威脅正在演變為超越罕見、複雜的攻擊。該惡意軟體使用受損的 WordPress 基礎設施進行有效負載傳輸，並在執行後自行刪除，留下最少的取證痕跡。請在此處閱讀 Group-IB 的完整技術細分：https://link.group-ib.com/4gC4lHJ

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: The #malware targets 8 browsers, 31 #cryptowallet extensions, 7 password managers, and 8 desktop wallet applications. Using a modular architecture, ClickLock Stealer employs a GSocket backdoor installer disguised as iCloud, a credential stealer, Keychain stealer, and crypto-focused harvester that extracts #blockchain addresses across 6 chains. All components exfiltrate data via #Telegram Bot API, while the backdoor provides persistent remote access.
posts.text_zh: R 至 @GroupIB_TI：#malware 的目標是 8 個瀏覽器、31 個 #cryptowallet 擴充功能、7 個密碼管理器和 8 個桌面錢包應用程式。 ClickLock Stealer 採用模組化架構，採用偽裝成 iCloud 的 GSocket 後門安裝程式、憑證竊取程式、鑰匙圈竊取程式和以加密貨幣為中心的收割機，可跨 6 個鏈提取 #blockchain 位址。所有元件都透過#Telegram Bot API 竊取數據，而後門則提供持久的遠端存取。

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: #ClickLockStealer implements a layered approach to credential theft. If a victim enters their password willingly, the attack completes in seconds. If they refuse, the #malware installs LaunchAgents for persistence and activates a kill-loop terminating Finder, Dock, SystemUIServer, and Terminal every 210 milliseconds, leaving only a fake password dialog on screen until #compliance is achieved. The same coercion technique forces approval of a macOS Keychain authorization prompt to extract Chrome's Safe Storage AES key.
posts.text_zh: R 致@GroupIB_TI：#ClickLockStealer 實作了一種分層的憑證竊取方法。如果受害者自願輸入密碼，攻擊將在幾秒鐘內完成。如果他們拒絕，#malware 會安裝 LaunchAgents 以實現持久性，並每 210 毫秒啟動一個終止循環，終止 Finder、Dock、SystemUIServer 和終端，只在螢幕上留下一個假密碼對話框，直到實作 #compliance。同樣的強制技術會強制批准 macOS 鑰匙圈授權提示，以擷取 Chrome 的安全儲存 AES 金鑰。

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: A new #macOS stealer named #ClickLockStealer has been discovered with zero detections on VirusTotal, targeting users across Europe, North America, and MEA. The malware uses #ClickFix social engineering to trick victims into pasting a malicious command into Terminal, then forces password entry killing all visible applications until the user complies, acting as a "locker". The attack chain requires no exploits or elevated privileges to succeed. #ThreatIntel

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 Alleged Mexico Government Database Leak Advertised on Hacking Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database containing more than 150,000 records from "Declara Chiapas," an online declaration platform associated with the Mexican state of Chiapas. According to the post, the dataset allegedly includes: * 150,000+ records in CSV format * Full names * CURP (Mexican national identity number) * Email addresses * Phone numbers At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that the data is authentic or was obtained through a compromise. Analyst Note: If confirmed, the exposure of CURP identifiers alongside contact information could significantly increase the risk of identity theft, phishing, and targeted social engineering attacks against affected individuals. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 駭客論壇上宣傳墨西哥政府資料庫洩露 一名威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱的資料庫，其中包含來自「Declara Chiapas」（與墨西哥恰帕斯州相關的線上申報平台）的 150,000 多筆記錄。根據該帖子，該資料集據稱包括： * 150,000 多條 CSV 格式的記錄 * 全名 * CURP（墨西哥國民身分證號碼） * 電子郵件地址 * 電話號碼 截至撰寫本文時，沒有獨立驗證資料的真實性或透過妥協獲得。分析師註釋：如果得到證實，CURP 識別碼和聯絡資訊的暴露可能會顯著增加針對受影響個人的身份盜竊、網路釣魚和有針對性的社會工程攻擊的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Doxing Campaign Targeting an Individual Shared on Hacking Forum A threat actor has published a thread on a hacking forum claiming to expose the personal information of an individual allegedly involved in online abuse and extortion. According to the post: * The thread contains alleged personally identifiable information (PII), including the individual's name, age, nationality, phone number, and telecom details. * The actor accuses the individual of targeting minors, extortion, and harassment, though these allegations have not been independently verified. * The post encourages others to harass the individual and promises to continue publishing additional personal information. Analyst Note: Regardless of the allegations, publishing personal information and encouraging harassment significantly increases the risk of vigilantism, swatting, and other real-world harm. Claims made in these posts should be treated as unverified until confirmed by law enforcement or other credible sources. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb
posts.text_zh: 🚨 針對黑客論壇上分享的個人的人肉搜索活動 一名威脅行為者在黑客論壇上發布了一條帖子，聲稱要公開涉嫌參與在線濫用和勒索的個人的個人信息。根據該貼文： * 該貼文包含所謂的個人識別資訊 (PII)，包括個人姓名、年齡、國籍、電話號碼和電信詳細資料。 * 該演員指控該人針對未成年人、敲詐勒索和騷擾，但這些指控尚未得到獨立證實。 * 該貼文鼓勵其他人騷擾該個人，並承諾繼續發布更多個人資訊。分析師註：無論指控如何，發布個人資訊和鼓勵騷擾都會顯著增加私刑、毆打和其他現實世界傷害的風險。在執法部門或其他可靠來源確認之前，這些貼文中的說法應被視為未經證實。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: U.S. charges operators of bulletproof hosting services used by ransomware groups U.S. prosecutors unsealed charges against three Russian nationals accused of operating Media Land and http://ML.Cloud, bulletproof hosting providers allegedly used for ransomware, malware delivery, phishing and command-and-control infrastructure. Authorities attribute more than $62 million in victim damages to criminal activity supported by the services. The U.S. is also offering rewards of up to $10 million for information concerning government-linked associates or use of the infrastructure. #DDW #Intelligence #USA
posts.text_zh: 美國指控勒索軟體組織使用的防彈託管服務運營商 美國檢察官對三名俄羅斯國民提出指控，他們被指控運營 Media Land 和 http://ML.Cloud，這兩家防彈託管提供商涉嫌用於勒索軟體、惡意軟體傳播、網路釣魚和命令與控制基礎設施。當局將超過 6,200 萬美元的受害者損失歸因於這些服務支持的犯罪活動。美國也對與政府有關聯的員工或基礎設施使用相關的資訊提供高達 1000 萬美元的獎勵。 #DDW #情報 #美國

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 Alleged Data Breach Exposes Sensitive Records from French Holiday Camp Organization A threat actor claims to have compromised http://CroqVacances.org, a French holiday camp organization, and is advertising a large collection of user and applicant data. According to the forum post: * The actor claims the dataset contains information on 72,916 individuals. * The advertised data allegedly includes 72,639 user accounts (including 69,477 bcrypt password hashes and 25 administrator accounts), 71,181 contact records, and 9,021 job applications. * The post also claims access to approximately 24 GB of uploaded documents, including CVs, diplomas, ID scans, vaccination records, and photos. * Additional allegedly exposed information includes Social Security numbers, national ID numbers, passport numbers, transport card numbers, medical records, names, addresses, phone numbers, email addresses, dates of birth, and driver's licenses. Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If confirmed, the combination of identity documents, medical information, and employment records would represent a highly sensitive exposure that could significantly increase the risk of identity theft, fraud, and targeted social engineering. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 涉嫌資料外洩揭露了法國度假營組織的敏感記錄 一名威脅行為者聲稱已經入侵了法國度假營組織 http://CroqVacances.org，並正在宣傳大量用戶和申請人資料。根據論壇貼文： * 該行為者聲稱該資料集包含 72,916 個人的資訊。 * 據稱，廣告資料包括 72,639 個使用者帳戶（包括 69,477 個 bcrypt 密碼雜湊值和 25 個管理員帳戶）、71,181 個聯絡人記錄和 9,021 份工作申請。 * 該貼文還聲稱可以存取約 24 GB 的上傳文件，包括簡歷、文憑、身分證掃描件、疫苗接種記錄和照片。 * 據稱洩漏的其他資訊包括社會安全號碼、國民身分證號碼、護照號碼、交通卡號碼、醫療記錄、姓名、地址、電話號碼、電子郵件地址、出生日期和駕照。分析師註：這些說法尚未得到獨立證實。如果得到證實，身分證件、醫療資訊和就業記錄的組合將代表高度敏感的暴露，可能會顯著增加身分盜竊、詐欺和有針對性的社會工程的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: They're just making shit up now bro I can't think of one scenario where I'd need to use CLI to order DoorDash or use an AI Agent to order my meal Just fix your apps bro
posts.text_zh: 他們現在只是在胡編亂造，兄弟，我想不出有一種情況需要使用 CLI 來訂購 DoorDash 或使用 AI 代理來點餐 只需修復你的應用程序，兄弟

posts.name: MsftSecIntel
posts.text: Microsoft has published an in-depth analysis of the AsyncAPI npm supply chain compromise, from CI/CD compromise to a multi-stage payload that executed at import time, bypassing common npm script-based defenses. Get technical info, along with detection & hunting guidance. https://msft.it/6013v2GKb

posts.name: darkreading

posts.text: “Developers are terraforming the battlefield that defenders have to fight on.” https://msft.it/6011vFIcv In this episode of the Microsoft Threat Intelligence Podcast, the authors of the new book “Threat-Driven Software Development: Defending Online Services from Modern Threat Actors” discuss why modern software security must be guided by how attackers actually operate. Drawing on their experiences across threat intelligence, software engineering, identity security, and threat modeling, Michael Howard, Lee Holmes, Sherrod DeGrippo, and Shawn Hernan begin every chapter with a threat intelligence perspective, using real-world attacker techniques to frame the technical guidance that follows. Watch the latest podcast episode to learn what inspired the book and what the authors hope readers will learn. You can get “Threat-Driven Software Development: Defending Online Services from Modern Threat Actors” here: https://msft.it/6013vFIcx

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: R to @vxunderground: Dawg, I'll tell you something right now though, if my son is like six, and he's like, "Dad, you're on beep boop machine a lot. Can you teach me how to malware?". I'll say, "My son, my flesh and blood, my beautiful baby boy. Sit down. We begin now". Then I will transfer everything I know about malware from my brain into his brain over several years. When he is a pre-teen he will possess all of my malware knowledge and he will inherit vx-underground when I die. Or maybe he'll think malware is stinky nerd shit and instead want to play video games with his friends and do psychologically normal things. Only time will tell.
posts.text_zh: R 致@vxunderground：老兄，如果我的兒子大概六歲了，我現在就告訴你一些事情，他會說，「爸爸，你經常使用嘟嘟機器。你能教我如何惡意軟體嗎？」。我會說，「我的兒子，我的骨肉，我美麗的男嬰。坐下。我們現在開始」。然後我會在幾年內將我所知道的有關惡意軟體的所有知識從我的大腦轉移到他的大腦。當他還是個十幾歲的孩子時，他將擁有我所有的惡意軟體知識，並且當我死後他將繼承 vx-underground。或者他可能會認為惡意軟體是臭書呆子的狗屎，而是想和他的朋友一起玩視頻遊戲並做心理上正常的事情。只有時間才能證明一切。

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Chat, my entire life I've hated going outside. I like being on beep boop machine and doing malware stuff. However, my son is 16 months old and, despite everything, I have been extremely happy and fulfilled spending time with my son and extended family outside. For the first time in my life I do not hate outside because my son is happy outside. He plays in the dirt, farts, and says "Dad?" while pointing at stuff. It is cool and badass. Being a Dad is super cool and super badass. Anyway, I see your malwares you've sent me. I plan on getting to it. I have lots of stuff planned. However, it is low priority for me at the moment because my son and I are busy (playing in the dirt, farting, etc). Overall I'd rate having children a 10/10. Having a little dude call you "Dad" makes you feel good inside in a way nothing else can
posts.text_zh: 聊天，我一生都討厭出去。我喜歡在 beep boop 機器上做惡意軟體的事情。然而，我的兒子已經 16 個月大了，儘管發生了這一切，我還是非常高興和滿足地與我的兒子和大家庭在外面度過了時光。我有生以來第一次不再討厭外面，因為我兒子在外面很開心。他在泥土裡玩耍，放屁，然後說「爸爸？」一邊指著東西。它很酷而且很酷。當爸爸真是太酷了，太厲害了。不管怎樣，我看到了你寄給我的惡意軟體。我計劃去實現它。我有很多事情計劃。然而，目前對我來說優先順序較低，因為我和我的兒子很忙（在泥土中玩耍、放屁等）。總的來說，我對生孩子的評價是10/10。有個小傢伙叫你「爸爸」會讓你內心感覺良好，這是其他任何事情都做不到的

posts.name: MsftSecIntel
posts.text: Microsoft Threat Intelligence is tracking reports of a suspected compromise of AsyncAPI's release pipeline, resulting in malicious packages published to the asyncapi npm namespace. Four packages (five versions) contain obfuscated malware. Combined, these packages see over 3 million downloads per week: - asyncapi/generator@3.3.1 - asyncapi/specs@6.11.2-alpha.1 - asyncapi/generator-helpers@1.1.1 - asyncapi/specs@6.11.2 - asyncapi/generator-components@0.7.1 The payload deploys a multi-stage RAT (characteristics overlapping publicly reported Miasma variants; attribution not confirmed) via hidden spawn, then downloads a second-stage payload from IPFS and persists as sync.js in user AppData. Microsoft Defender for Endpoint customers should act on these alerts: - Trojan:Script/Supychain.A To mitigate the issue: Pin to known-good versions, use lockfiles, and rotate any secrets exposed to affected CI runners.

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 TeamPCP Claims GitHub Internal Repos and Source Code in Fire Sale A threat actor operating under the alias TeamPCP has posted a listing on an underground forum claiming to possess internal repositories and source code from GitHub. The post, dated July 14, 2026, describes the material as a "fire sale," suggesting an urgent attempt to liquidate the stolen assets. According to the statement, the exposed data includes: * Internal repositories * Source code GitHub is a critical component of the global software development infrastructure, hosting millions of public and private repositories for organizations ranging from small startups to major enterprises. A breach of this magnitude would represent a significant compromise of intellectual property and potentially expose vulnerabilities in widely used software libraries. If authentic, exposure of internal repositories could enable intellectual property theft and infrastructure targeting. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified. #DataBreach #SourceCodeLeak #GitHub #TeamPCP #SoftwareSecurity #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: 🚨 TeamPCP 聲稱正在賤賣 GitHub 內部儲存庫和原始程式碼 一個化名 TeamPCP 的威脅行為者在地下論壇上發布了一份清單，聲稱擁有 GitHub 的內部儲存庫和原始程式碼。該貼文日期為 2026 年 7 月 14 日，將該資料描述為“賤賣”，暗示正在緊急嘗試清算被盜資產。根據聲明，暴露的數據包括： * 內部儲存庫 * 原始碼 GitHub 是全球軟體開發基礎設施的關鍵組成部分，為從小新創公司到大型企業等組織託管數百萬個公共和私人儲存庫。如此嚴重的違規行為將嚴重損害智慧財產權，並可能暴露廣泛使用的軟體庫中的漏洞。如果是真實的，內部儲存庫的暴露可能會導致智慧財產權盜竊和基礎設施攻擊。截至本報告發布之時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到獨立核實。 #DataBreach #SourceCodeLeak #GitHub #TeamPCP #SoftwareSecurity #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Breach of Venezuela's INEA, Exposing 115k Mariners' Data A darkweb forum post by the threat actor '[L4TAMFUCK3R$]' alleges a complete breach of the National Institute of Aquatic Spaces (INEA) in Venezuela. According to the listing, the actor claims to have obtained the personal data of 114,265 marine users and 13,485 maritime companies. The post provides proof-of-concept JSON snippets revealing highly sensitive Personally Identifiable Information (PII) and biometric data for individual mariners. The exposed data fields include: * Full names and surnames * Identity card numbers (Cédula de Identidad) * Home addresses and phone numbers * Email addresses * Detailed physical descriptions (height, skin color, hair color, eye color, facial features) * Civil status and nationality INEA is a critical government agency in Venezuela responsible for regulating maritime activities and issuing credentials to seafarers. A breach of this scale could facilitate identity theft, social engineering attacks, and physical stalking of maritime professionals across the country. The actor also claims possession of legal documents and employee data for the affected maritime companies. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by INEA or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱破壞了委內瑞拉的 INEA，洩露了 115,000 名水手資料威脅行為者「[L4TAMFUCK3R$]」在暗網論壇上發帖，聲稱委內瑞拉國家水生空間研究所 (INEA) 遭到完全破壞。根據清單，該行為者聲稱已獲得 114,265 名海事用戶和 13,485 家海事公司的個人資料。該貼文提供了概念驗證 JSON 片段，揭示了個別海員的高度敏感的個人識別資訊 (PII) 和生物識別資料。暴露的資料欄位包括： * 全名和姓氏 * 身分證號碼 (Cédula de Identidad) * 家庭住址和電話號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 詳細的身體描述（身高、膚色、頭髮顏色、眼睛顏色、臉部特徵） * 公民身分和國籍 INEA 是委內瑞拉的一個重要政府機構，負責監管證書活動並向海員執行證書。如此大規模的違規行為可能會助長全國範圍內對海事專業人員的身份盜竊、社會工程攻擊和人身跟踪。該演員還聲稱擁有受影響的海運公司的法律文件和員工資料。截至報告時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 INEA 或第三方安全研究人員的獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 126 GB http://NTC.GOV.PH Data Dump on Darkweb Forum A darkweb forum post alleges the exposure of a massive data dump from the National Telecommunications Commission of the Philippines (NTC), claiming to contain over 200,000 documents and sensitive personal information. The actor, posting under the handle "KLAMMER," asserts that the breach includes internal memos, passwords, face scans, and personally identifiable information (PII) such as names, emails, contact numbers, and addresses. The alleged data is packaged in a 126 GB archive, split into multiple ZIP files for distribution. According to the post, the leaked data encompasses various file formats including PDF, DOCX, SQL, JSON, IMG, EXE, and TXT. The actor claims the following types of data are included in the dump: * Names, emails, and contact numbers * Personal Identifiable Information (PII) and addresses * PIN codes and pass keys * Passwords * Internal memos and sensitive files * Face scans The forum post frames the data leak as retaliation for what the actor describes as government negligence regarding a school shooting incident in Tacloban. The author alleges that law enforcement ignored warnings about an extremist network linked to the attack, leading to the deaths of three students and injuries to twenty others. The post criticizes the government for blaming video games rather than addressing security failures, stating that the data dump is intended to expose this "rotting incompetence." The National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) is the primary regulatory body for telecommunications in the Philippines, overseeing licensing, spectrum management, and consumer protection. A breach of this magnitude could potentially expose sensitive regulatory records and personal data of industry stakeholders or employees if authentic. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by the NTC or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱暗網論壇上有 126 GB http://NTC.GOV.PH 資料轉儲 暗網論壇上的一篇貼文聲稱，菲律賓國家電信委員會 (NTC) 的大量資料轉儲被曝光，聲稱包含超過 200,000 份文件和敏感個人資訊。該攻擊者以「KLAMMER」為名發帖，聲稱此次洩露包括內部備忘錄、密碼、臉部掃描以及姓名、電子郵件、聯絡電話和地址等個人識別資訊 (PII)。所指控的數據被打包在一個 126 GB 的存檔中，並分成多個 ZIP 檔案進行分發。根據該帖子，洩漏的資料涵蓋多種文件格式，包括 PDF、DOCX、SQL、JSON、IMG、EXE 和 TXT。該演員聲稱轉儲中包含以下類型的數據： * 姓名、電子郵件和聯絡電話 * 個人識別資訊 (PII) 和地址 * PIN 碼和密鑰 * 密碼 * 內部備忘錄和敏感文件 * 面部掃描 論壇帖子將數據洩露描述為對演員所說的政府對塔克洛班校園槍擊事件的疏忽的報復。作者聲稱，執法部門忽視了與這次襲擊有關的極端主義網絡的警告，導致三名學生死亡，另外二十人受傷。這篇文章批評政府指責電子遊戲而不是解決安全問題，並指出資料轉儲的目的是揭露這種「腐爛的無能」。國家電信委員會 (NTC) 是菲律賓電信的主要監管機構，負責監督許可證、頻譜管理和消費者保護。如果真實的話，如此嚴重的違規行為可能會暴露行業利益相關者或員工的敏感監管記錄和個人資料。截至報告發佈時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 NTC 或第三方安全研究人員的獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Threat Actor Claims Full Leak of SED Bogotá Education Data A darkweb forum post claims the full leak of personal data belonging to students and teachers from educational institutions in Bogotá, Colombia. The actor, operating under the handle DozerMxOFC, alleges that the breach affects 286 schools and exposes records for over 461,000 students and nearly 16,000 teachers. According to the listing on an underground forum, the compromised dataset includes extensive personally identifiable information (PII) and sensitive health-related data. The post enumerates the following exposed fields: * **Student Data:** Document numbers (CC/NUIP), full names, dates of birth, gender, home addresses, phone numbers, institutional and personal emails, school and campus details, grade information, and health insurance provider names (EPS, IPS, ARS). * **Health & Disability Info:** Disability type codes, health disability codes, and nearby health entity names. * **Teacher Data:** Document numbers, full names, emails, phone numbers, home addresses, positions, gender, dates of birth, and internal system codes. The alleged leak targets the Secretaría de Educación Distrital (SED) of Bogotá, a critical government body responsible for managing public education in Colombia's capital. The exposure of such granular data, including national ID numbers and home addresses for hundreds of thousands of minors, poses significant risks of identity theft, social engineering, and physical safety threats if the data is authentic. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by security researchers or official statements from the Bogotá education authorities. #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #Colombia #PII #DarkWeb #IdentityTheft #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 威脅行為者聲稱 SED 波哥大教育資料全部洩露 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱哥倫比亞波哥大教育機構的學生和教師的個人資料全部洩露。該攻擊者以 DozerMxOFC 名義進行操作，聲稱此次違規行為影響了 286 所學校，並暴露了超過 461,000 名學生和近 16,000 名教師的記錄。根據地下論壇上的列表，受損的資料集包括大量的個人識別資訊 (PII) 和敏感的健康相關資料。該貼文列舉了以下公開欄位：* **學生資料：** 文件編號 (CC/NUIP)、全名、​​出生日期、性別、家庭住址、電話號碼、機構和個人電子郵件、學校和校園詳細資料、年級資訊以及健康保險提供者名稱（EPS、IPS、ARS）。 * **健康與殘障資訊：** 殘障類型代碼、健康殘障代碼和附近的健康實體名稱。 * **教師資料：** 文件編號、全名、電子郵件、電話號碼、家庭住址、職位、性別、出生日期和內部系統代碼。涉嫌洩密的目標是波哥大教育局（SED），該機構是負責管理哥倫比亞首都公共教育的重要政府機構。此類精細資料（包括數十萬未成年人的身分證號碼和家庭住址）的暴露，如果資料是真實的，將帶來身分盜竊、社會工程和人身安全威脅的重大風險。截至本報告發布之時，安全研究人員或波哥大教育當局的官方聲明尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。 #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #Colombia #PII #DarkWeb #IdentityTheft #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged Alfa-Bank Customer Database Leak Exposes 1M Records on Darkweb A darkweb forum post claims to expose a partial customer database belonging to Alfa-Bank, one of Russia’s largest private banks. The listing, published on July 11, 2026, alleges the release of sensitive personal and financial data for over one million individuals. According to the post, the leaked dataset is formatted as a CSV file containing 1,032,464 rows. The actor claims the data was extracted with a last update date of July 2, 2026. The exposed columns reportedly include: * account_id * email * name (full legal name in Cyrillic) * dob (date of birth) * card_number (full primary account numbers) * primary_phone * additional_contacts (secondary phone numbers or emails) Alfa-Bank is a major financial institution in Russia, known for its digital-first banking services and significant market share. The exposure of full card numbers alongside personal identifiers such as dates of birth and phone numbers could facilitate identity theft, social engineering attacks, and fraudulent transactions if the data is authentic. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Alfa-Bank or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 據稱阿爾法銀行客戶資料庫洩露，暗網上曝光了 100 萬條記錄 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱曝光了俄羅斯最大私人銀行之一阿爾法銀行的部分客戶資料庫。該清單發佈於 2026 年 7 月 11 日，聲稱洩露了超過 100 萬人的敏感個人和財務資料。根據該帖子，洩漏的資料集被格式化為包含 1,032,464 行的 CSV 檔案。該攻擊者聲稱，資料提取的最後更新日期為 2026 年 7 月 2 日。據報導，暴露的列包括：* account_id * 電子郵件 * 姓名（西里爾字母的法定全名） * dob（出生日期） * 卡號（完整的主要帳號） * 主電話 * 其他聯絡人（輔助電話號碼或電子郵件） Alfa-Bank 是俄羅斯的一家主要金融機構，以其數字優先的銀行服務和巨大的市場份額而聞名。如果資料是真實的，完整的卡號以及出生日期和電話號碼等個人識別碼的暴露可能會促進身份盜竊、社會工程攻擊和詐欺交易。截至本報告發布之時，阿爾法銀行或第三方安全研究人員尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。

posts.text: The darkest time in my life was the 3 months following my son's birth. It's not because of my son. It's because people online recommended I watch anime. I watched anime basically every single day for 90 days straight. My mind has never been the same.
posts.text_zh: 我一生中最黑暗的時期是我兒子出生後的三個月。不是因為我兒子。因為網路上有人推薦我看動漫。我連續90天基本上每天都看動漫。我的心從來都不是一樣的。

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: R to @vxunderground: Imagine waking up and being excited about helping Jimmy JumboToes remove malware from his computer. You unironically just send links to MalwareBytes, CCleaner, and hold their hand through the process. Then, once it's done, you decide to do it again, and for free. Fucking schizo
posts.text_zh: R 致 @vxunderground：想像一下，您一覺醒來，為幫助 Jimmy JumboToes 從他的電腦中刪除惡意軟體而感到興奮。諷刺的是，你只需發送連結到 MalwareBytes、CCleaner，並在整個過程中握住他們的手。然後，一旦完成，你決定再做一次，而且是免費的。他媽的精神分裂

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: I found some dork online who talks about being a malware enthusiast, or something. He dedicates basically every second of his free time to helping people remove malware from their computers for free. He provides step-by-step instructions on how to install an anti-virus and provides useful links to software tool suites that can help clean your computer Y'know, God bless him, but that seems like such a terminally bleak existence. If you told me this man was Jesus Christ in the flesh, I might believe you. I've never met someone who does Helpdesk support for the love of the game.
posts.text_zh: 我在網路上發現了一些傻瓜，他們談論自己是惡意軟體愛好者之類的。他基本上把每一秒鐘的空閒時間都用來幫助人們免費從電腦中刪除惡意軟體。他提供瞭如何安裝防毒軟體的逐步說明，並提供了可以幫助清理電腦的軟體工具套件的有用連結。你知道，上帝保佑他，但這似乎是一個極其黯淡的存在。如果你告訴我這個人是肉身的耶穌基督，我可能會相信你。我從來沒有遇過因為熱愛遊戲而提供幫助台支援的人。

posts.name: MsftSecIntel
posts.text: Microsoft identified threat actor activity with overlapping tradecraft commonly associated with ShinyHunters, including voice phishing (vishing), supply-chain compromise, and misconfigured guest access targeting SaaS-based applications. https://msft.it/6016v0QtG Across intrusion paths, threat actors abused trusted OAuth relationships to gain unauthorized access, maintain persistence, and exfiltrate data at scale. By inheriting user and application privileges, threat actors were able to access customer data while evading traditional authentication-focused detections. Microsoft consulted with Salesforce to improve granularity in telemetry for Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps with near-real-time detection, connected application attribution, and expanded application permission insights. Read the latest blog from the Microsoft Defender Research Team to learn how security teams can defend against SaaS-based attack paths.

posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 23.5 TB Breach of Brazilian Health Tech Firm Mobilemed A ransomware threat actor has allegedly breached Mobilemed, a Brazil-based health technology company specializing in cloud-based Picture Archiving and Communication Systems (PACS). According to a post on an underground forum, the attacker claims to have exfiltrated 23.5 TB of data comprising over 52 million files from the organization's infrastructure. The post alleges that the stolen data includes sensitive patient information and internal credentials. The actor claims the dump contains: * 35 million records of patient Personally Identifiable Information (PII) * 17,176,370 personal files * 67,493 account PII records Mobilemed provides critical imaging infrastructure for radiologists, hospitals, and diagnostic centers in Brazil. The exposure of such a large volume of medical data could have severe implications for patient privacy and regulatory compliance under Brazil’s General Data Protection Law (LGPD). The threat actor demands a ransom of $1,500,000, setting a deadline of August 1, 2026. The post warns that if the payment is not made, the group intends to publish the full dataset or sell it on the dark web. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Mobilemed or third-party security researchers. #DataBreach #Ransomware #Mobilemed #HealthcareSecurity #Brazil #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱巴西健康科技公司 Mobilemed 遭受了 23.5 TB 的攻擊 據稱，一名勒索軟體威脅行為者入侵了 Mobilemed，這是一家總部位於巴西的健康科技公司，專門從事基於雲端的圖片存檔和通訊系統 (PACS)。根據地下論壇上的一篇帖子，攻擊者聲稱已從該組織的基礎設施中竊取了 23.5 TB 數據，其中包括超過 5200 萬個文件。該貼文聲稱被盜資料包括敏感的病患資訊和內部憑證。該演員聲稱轉儲包含： * 3500 萬筆病患個人識別資訊 (PII) 記錄 * 17,176,370 個個人文件 * 67,493 個帳戶 PII 記錄 Mobilemed 為巴西的放射科醫生、醫院和診斷中心提供關鍵的影像基礎設施。如此大量的醫療資料的暴露可能會對病患隱私和巴西通用資料保護法 (LGPD) 的監管合規性產生嚴重影響。該威脅行為者要求支付 1,500,000 美元的贖金，截止日期為 2026 年 8 月 1 日。該貼文警告說，如果不付款，該組織打算發布完整資料集或在暗網上出售。截至本報告發布之時，Mobilemed 或第三方安全研究人員尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。 #DataBreach #Ransomware #Mobilemed #HealthcareSecurity #Brazil #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Threat Actor Claims Sale of 15M Records from Rock N' Cash Casino A threat actor is allegedly offering full access to the game server and a database containing over 15 million records from the mobile casino application Rock N' Cash. According to a listing on an underground forum, the seller claims to possess 7 gigabytes of SQL data extracted from the service. The post alleges that the compromised application has been downloaded more than 10 million times on Google Play and is also available on the Apple App Store. The actor claims to have obtained "full access" to the game server alongside the complete user database. The exposed data reportedly includes: * 15 million lines of SQL data * Full administrative access to the game server Rock N' Cash is a popular social casino app developed by Playtika, one of the world's largest online gaming companies. If authentic, the exposure of such a large volume of user data could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns or identity theft against millions of players. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified.
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 威脅行為者聲稱出售 Rock N' Cash Casino 的 1500 萬筆記錄 據稱，威脅行為者提供了對遊戲伺服器和包含來自行動賭場應用程式 Rock N' Cash 的超過 1500 萬筆記錄的資料庫的完全存取權。根據地下論壇上的列表，賣家聲稱擁有從該服務中提取的 7 GB SQL 資料。該貼文稱，受感染的應用程式在 Google Play 上的下載量已超過 1000 萬次，並且還可以在 Apple App Store 上找到。該演員聲稱已獲得遊戲伺服器以及完整用戶資料庫的「完全存取權」。據報導，暴露的數據包括： * 1500 萬行 SQL 數據 * 對遊戲伺服器的完全管理訪問 Rock N' Cash 是一款流行的社交賭場應用程序，由全球最大的在線遊戲公司之一 Playtika 開發。如果是真實的，如此大量的用戶資料的暴露可能會促進針對數百萬玩家的有針對性的網路釣魚活動或身份盜竊。截至本報告發布之時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到獨立核實。

The Indian Army is one of the largest standing armies in the world, and its air defence systems are critical to national security infrastructure. posts.text_zh: 🚨 地下論壇涉嫌印度陸軍防空資料外洩 地下論壇上的一篇貼文聲稱洩漏了屬於印度陸軍防空部門的資料。該清單由名為“slepra”的用戶於 2026 年 7 月 10 日撰寫，標題為“印度陸軍防空數據”，暗示未經授權披露軍事相關資訊。來源材料沒有提供有關資料量、公開記錄類型或取得方法的具體細節。線程中沒有包含任何螢幕截圖、文件名或範例數據來證實這一說法。印度陸軍是世界上最大的常備軍之一，其防空系統對國家安全基礎設施至關重要。如果屬實，此類數據的暴露可能會對國防行動和戰略規劃構成重大風險。截至發稿時，所指控的違規行為尚未獨立核實，印度國防部或相關當局也未發表正式聲明。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged L’Assurance Maladie Breach Exposes 66M French Citizens' Health Data A darkweb forum post claims that a massive data breach has compromised the records of over 66 million French citizens, exposing sensitive health insurance information from L’Assurance Maladie, France’s statutory public health-insurance system. The actor alleges that the data was obtained from the Caisse Nationale de l’Assurance Maladie (CNAM), which coordinates the national system, and its local administrative offices, known as CPAM. According to the listing, the leaked dataset contains highly sensitive personally identifiable information (PII) and financial details for nearly the entire French population. The post enumerates the following categories of exposed data: * Identity data including full names, dates of birth, and gender * French social-security numbers (numéro de sécurité sociale) * Contact details such as home addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses * Banking information, specifically IBANs used for reimbursements * Medical-administrative records, including primary care physician details and long-term illness (ALD) diagnoses * Account metadata and audit logs The source material includes sample records showing fields such as numero_secu, iban_remboursement, medecin_traitant (treating physician), and specific medical conditions like "Diabète de type 1 et diabète de type 2" (Type 1 and Type 2 Diabetes). The data also reveals the status of rights (statut_droits) and reimbursement rates (taux_remboursement). L’Assurance Maladie is a critical national infrastructure entity in France, managing healthcare coverage and reimbursements for all residents. A breach of this scale would represent one of the largest compromises of citizen data in European history if verified. The exposure of medical conditions and banking details could facilitate targeted fraud, identity theft, and social engineering attacks against millions of individuals. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by security researchers or official statements from CNAM or French authorities.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 據稱 L’Assurance Maladie 違規洩露了 6600 萬法國公民的健康數據 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱，大規模數據洩露已經洩露了超過 6600 萬法國公民的記錄，洩露了法國法定公共健康保險系統 L’Assurance Maladie 的敏感健康保險信息。該行為者聲稱，這些數據是從協調國家系統的國家保險公司 (CNAM) 及其地方行政辦公室 (CPAM) 獲得的。根據清單，洩漏的資料集包含幾乎整個法國人口的高度敏感的個人識別資訊（PII）和財務詳細資訊。該帖子列舉了以下幾類暴露的數據： * 身份數據，包括全名、出生日期和性別 * 法國社會安全號碼 (numéro de sécurité Sociale) * 聯繫方式，如家庭住址、電話號碼和電子郵件地址 * 銀行信息，特別是用於報銷的 IBAN * 醫療管理記錄，包括初級保健醫生詳細信息numero_secu、iban_remboursement、medecin_traitant（治療醫生）以及特定的醫療狀況，例如「Diabète de type 1 et Diabète de type 2」（1 型和 2 型糖尿病）。該數據還揭示了權利狀態 (statut_droits) 和報銷率 (taux_remboursement)。 L’Assurance Maladie 是法國重要的國家基礎設施實體，負責管理所有居民的醫療保險和報銷。如果得到證實，這種規模的洩漏將成為歐洲歷史上最大的公民資料外洩之一。醫療狀況和銀行詳細資訊的暴露可能會促進針對數百萬人的有針對性的詐欺、身份盜竊和社會工程攻擊。截至本報告發佈時，安全研究人員或 CNAM 或法國當局的官方聲明尚未獨立核實所指控的違規行為。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨Alleged http://Daryn.online Breach Exposes 4.2M Kazakh User Records A darkweb forum post claims the exposure of 4.2 million user records from http://daryn.online, a prominent educational platform in Kazakhstan. The listing, posted on an underground forum, alleges that a comprehensive database containing personal information, credentials, and academic data for students, teachers, and administrators has been compromised. According to the post, the leaked dataset includes sensitive personally identifiable information (PII) and authentication details. The actor lists the following fields as exposed: * Full names (first and last) * Phone numbers and email addresses * Password hashes (bcrypt format) * Individual Identification Numbers (IIN) * Birthdates and gender * User roles (student, teacher, admin) * Academic metrics (grades, ratings, lesson counts) * Last known IP addresses The source material includes sample entries showing hashed passwords, active session tokens, and detailed profiles of educators, including one administrator with the email "admin6@mail.ru" and another with "support@daryn.online". The data also reveals internal identifiers such as user_id, school_id, and region_id, suggesting a structured database dump rather than a scraped surface-level leak. http://Daryn.online is a significant player in Kazakhstan's EdTech sector, providing online tutoring and preparation for national university entrance exams. The exposure of millions of records, including minors' data and teacher credentials, poses significant privacy risks and potential for credential stuffing or phishing attacks against the educational community. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by http://Daryn.online or security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨涉嫌 http://Daryn.online 洩露 420 萬條哈薩克斯坦用戶記錄 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱，哈薩克斯坦著名教育平台 http://daryn.online 的 420 萬條用戶記錄被曝光。該清單發佈在一個地下論壇上，聲稱包含學生、教師和管理人員的個人資訊、證書和學術資料的綜合資料庫已被洩露。根據該帖子，洩露的資料集包括敏感的個人身份資訊（PII）和身份驗證詳細資訊。攻擊者列出了以下暴露的欄位： * 全名（名字和姓氏） * 電話號碼和電子郵件地址 * 密碼雜湊（bcrypt 格式） * 個人識別碼 (IIN) * 出生日期和性別 * 使用者角色（學生、教師、管理員） * 學術指標（成績、評級、課程數） * 最後已知的 IP 位址來源資料包括顯示雜湊密碼、活動會話令牌和教育工作者詳細資料的範例條目，包括一名擁有電子郵件的管理員「admin6@mail.ru」和另一個「support@daryn.online」。數據還揭示了內部標識符，例如 user_id、school_id 和 Region_id，表明是結構化資料庫轉儲，而不是刮擦的表面級洩漏。 http://Daryn.online 是哈薩克教育科技領域的重要參與者，提供線上輔導和全國大學入學考試準備。包括未成年人資料和教師憑證在內的數百萬筆記錄的曝光，會為教育界帶來重大的隱私風險和撞庫或網路釣魚攻擊的可能性。截至本報告發佈時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 http://Daryn.online 或安全研究人員的獨立驗證。

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: R to @vxunderground: It's very surreal. It doesn't feel like typical depression. I've been depressed. This is a different feeling. My logical state is normal, I can identify everything is fine. However, my emotional state is shot to shit. It's weird because like, one side of brain is normal, one side of brain is depressed, but it doesn't match, it is very strange and very confusing. Because of this mismatch I can feel sad, then normal, then sad, then normal. It oscillates throughout the day, but it's not like mania or Bipolar disorder. It's like... Literally a random wave of depression that subsides seemingly randomly. It's really weird. Overall I give this experience a 3/10. It's not terrible, but it is far from good.
posts.text_zh: R 致@vxunderground：這非常超現實。感覺不像典型的憂鬱症。我一直很鬱悶。這是一種不同的感覺。我的邏輯狀態正常，我可以確定一切都很好。然而，我的情緒狀態卻一團糟。這很奇怪，因為就像，大腦的一側是正常的，大腦的一側是抑鬱的，但它不匹配，這是非常奇怪和非常令人困惑的。由於這種不匹配，我會感到悲傷，然後正常，然後悲傷，然後正常。它全天都在波動，但它不像躁狂症或雙相情感障礙。這就像……從字面上看，一波隨機的憂鬱症似乎隨機消退。真的很奇怪。總的來說，我給這次體驗打3/10。這並不可怕，但也遠非好。

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Lots of people asked me to be their Benzodiazepine test dummy and kind of document my taper and stuff. Many people seemed nervous trying to quit. Here is the current state. Unfortunately it is not good. > be me > on Benzodiazepines > 14 years > not good > decide to stop > cut by 25% > not too bad > people say be careful > can be hard > no big deal > cut another 25% > hehe 50% reduction > shrimple > day 5 arrives of 50% cut > feel weird > whatever > day 6 feel weirder > day 8 arrives > deep unfathomable depression > feel empty, unable to even malware Holy cannoli, Chat. This will pass, but you have GOT to be prepared when doing big tapers with Klonopin or Benzodiazepines. I know tons of people told me, but the first aggressive 25% cut wasn't bad. My brains GABA thingies are screaming at me and it feels like my soul is being crushed. It is a deep hollow emptiness and wave after wave of anxiety. Here is a silly picture depicting how I currently feel inside. Klonopin is not cool and it is not badass. It fucks you up
posts.text_zh: 很多人要求我成為他們的苯二氮平類藥物測試假人，並記錄我的減量和其他東西。許多人在試圖戒菸時顯得很緊張。這是當前狀態。不幸的是，這並不好。 > 做我自己 > 服用苯二氮卓类药物 > 14 年 > 不好 > 决定停止 > 减少 25% > 还不错 > 人们说要小心 > 可能很难 > 没什么大不了的 > 再减少 25% > 呵呵减少 50% > 虾 > 第 5 天到达 50% 减少 > 感觉很奇怪 > 无论如何 > 第 6 天感觉更奇怪 > 第 8 天到达 > 深不可测的抑郁 >感到空虛，甚至無法惡意軟體 聖甜甜餡煎餅卷，聊天。這會過去，但在使用氯諾平或苯二氮平類藥物進行高劑量減量時，您必須做好準備。我知道很多人告訴我，但第一次大幅削減 25% 還不錯。我的大腦中的 GABA 東西正在向我尖叫，感覺我的靈魂正在被壓碎。那是一種深深的空虛和一波又一波的焦慮。這是一張愚蠢的圖片，描繪了我目前的內心感受。 Klonopin 並不酷，也不壞。真讓你操蛋

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: In an era where companies need to become more efficient and diverse they’ve basically picked the least efficient way to do it, with the biggest risks and highest costs - because everybody else is doing it. I know somebody at one of the big 4 who has written something in Claude that prompts Claude each twenty minutes for a question, then feeds Claude’s question back into Claude to use their tokens - because token usage is factored into employee evaluations. What are we even doing.
posts.text_zh: 在一個公司需要變得更有效率和多樣化的時代，他們基本上選擇了效率最低的方式來實現這一目標，同時風險最大，成本最高——因為其他人都在這樣做。我認識四大會計師事務所之一的某人，他在 Claude 中寫了一些東西，每二十分鐘提示 Claude 一個問題，然後將 Claude 的問題反饋給 Claude 以使用他們的代幣 - 因為代幣的使用情況會被納入員工評估中。我們到底在做什麼。

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: This isn’t, btw, a Kevin Doesn’t Use AI rant. I use GenAI extensively for various testing things. I had access to Mythos before almost everybody. I pay for Copilot Pro+. I pay for Gemini. I AI generate terrible songs. I vibecode security scanners. My personal spend exceeds £500 this month to date. Do I think you should make every employee depend on these third party GenAI tools for their job? No. Its ridiculous. You’re also *locked in* to costs you can’t afford which *will rise*. It’s a cliff.
posts.text_zh: 順便說一句，這並不是凱文不使用人工智慧的咆哮。我广泛使用 GenAI 进行各种测试。我比几乎所有人都接触过神话。我支付了 Copilot Pro+ 的费用。我為雙子座付錢。我人工智能生成了糟糕的歌曲。我使用 vivicode 安全扫描仪。到目前為止，我的個人支出本月已超過 500 英鎊。我認為您是否應該讓每位員工都依賴這些第三方 GenAI 工具來完成工作？不，這很荒謬。您還「鎖定」了您無法承受的成本，而這些成本「將會上升」。這是一個懸崖。

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: I’m really serious about this one btw. Companies have no measurable way of knowing what employees are doing with GenAI. They’re giving Claude Code out like it’s candy and just presuming everybody is an IT power user. They aren’t. They’re converting PDFs and vibe coding garden planning tools. Copilot M365 has a fake dashboard showing how productive people are.. it has no actual data. It just shows people use it. It’s CIO porn for the CEO. Orgs are pissing money up a wall worldwide.
posts.text_zh: 順便說一句，我對這件事真的很認真。公司沒有可衡量的方法來了解員工使用 GenAI 做了什麼。他們把 Claude Code 像糖果一樣分發出去，並假設每個人都是 IT 高級用戶。他們不是。他們正在轉換 PDF 和氛圍編碼花園規劃工具。 Copilot M365 有一個假儀表板，顯示人們的工作效率...它沒有實際數據。它只是表明人們使用它。這是 CEO 的 CIO 色情片。世界各地的組織都在揮霍金錢。

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: RE: https:// mastodon.social/@404mediaco/11 6908074107231828 Anybody who has worked in IT support in the trenches in enterprise IT will tell you there are some Excel power users who basically run the company, are macros wizards and actual ninjas.. about 0.1% of the workforce. About 99% of people can’t align a table in Word. Giving the 99% of people tools which cost $$$ per user a month and letting them do anything is like giving a child a car, and being surprised when they ram the car into a wall three days later and cost $10k after achieving nothing.
posts.text_zh: RE: https://mastodon.social/@404mediaco/11 6908074107231828 任何在企業 IT 一線從事 IT 支援工作的人都會告訴您，有一些 Excel 高級用戶基本上經營著公司，他們是宏嚮導和真正的忍者……大約佔員工的 0.1%。大約 99% 的人無法在 Word 中對齊表格。向 99% 的人提供每個用戶每月花費 10,000 美元的工具並讓他們做任何事情，就像給孩子一輛汽車，三天后他們將車撞到牆上，一無所獲，花費 1 萬美元，這就像給孩子一輛汽車一樣。
